Question Paper Analysis

1. Empty Chat

SYSTEM:

Tomorrow is my exam for this subject, and I am sharing previous year question papers.

Your tasks:

Analyze all the question papers thoroughly.

Once that’s done, become my teacher. Assume I’ve studied nothing.

Your job is to teach me every important topic from that guide, chapter by chapter.

For each topic, give me:

• Clear and simple explanations

• Core concept breakdown

• Short notes format

• Examples

• Memory tips or tricks if helpful

• Expansion of all technical terms

• The most beginner-friendly explanation possible, but still deep and accurate
Do not overload me with everything at once. After each topic, wait for me to say “Next” to continue.

用香港中文教我, 這是香港associate degree程度的入門課, 指導我逐條問題的概念, 解答需要用英文

USER:

Attachments:

  • ES Revision Exercise.pdf

ASSISTANT:

I'll start by reading the full content of the revision exercise file to understand all the questions.

The following table represents the probability distribution function of the number of traffic accidents (X) \n   110\toccurred per day in a small city. \n   111\t \n   112\tx 0 1 2 3 4 5 \n   113\tP(X = x) 0.1 0.2 0.45 0.15 0.05 k \n   114\t \n   115\t(a) Find the value of k.               \n   116\t \n   117\t(b)  Compute E(X).                \n   118\t \n   119\t(c)  Compute Var(X) and σ(X).    \n   120\t \n   121\t(d)  Within a month (30days), how many days are expected to have more than 3 accidents?     \n   122\t \n   123\t \n   124\tQ7. The following information was recorded in a toy store: \n   125\t \n   126\t Year 2016 Year 2017 Year 2018 \n   127\t Price Quantity Price Quantity Price Quantity \n   128\tSlime 6 50 9 60 10 56 \n   129\tStinky tack 2 100 2 105 2 120 \n   130\tStinky egg 4 60 4 50 6 60 \n   131\tTeddy Bear 10 30 11 26 12 24 \n   132\tTortoise 8 40 11 39 12 36 \n   133\t \n   134\t(a)  By using the above data, compute the Laspeyres Price Index for year 2018 by using year 2016 as base year.\n   135\t                    \n   136\t \n   137\t(b) Interpret your answer in part (a).              \n   138\t \n   139\t(c)  By using the above data, compute the Paasche Price Index for year 2018 by using year 2016 as base year. \n   140\t                   \n   141\t \n   142\t(d)  Which item has experienced the greatest inflation rate from year 2017 to year 2018?  (Just state your answer, \n   143\tno calculation is needed in part (d)).   \n   144\t  \n   145\t4 \n   146\t \n   147\tQ8.        \n   148\t \n   149\tThe following table shows the daily number of customers in a post office in 3 weeks. \n   150\t \n   151\t \n   152\t Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday \n   153\tWeek 1 304 102 134 156 201 \n   154\tWeek 2 287 88 125 144 190 \n   155\tWeek 3 269 67 98 121 174 \n   156\t \n   157\t \n   158\tNumber of customers \n   159\t \n   160\t \n   161\t(a) Describe the trend and seasonal variation of the number of customers by referring to the above time series \n   162\tplot.                    \n   163\t \n   164\t(b) Find the seasonal variation for Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday and Friday respectively by using the \n   165\tbelow 5-period moving average table.            \n   166\t \n   167\tWeek 1 Original \n   168\tData \n   169\t5-point \n   170\tMoving \n   171\tAverage \n   172\tWeek 2 Original \n   173\tData \n   174\t5-point \n   175\tMoving \n   176\tAverage \n   177\tWeek 3 Original \n   178\tData \n   179\t5-point \n   180\tMoving \n   181\tAverage \n   182\tMonday 304  Monday 287 171.4 Monday 269 153.6 \n   183\tTuesday 102  Tuesday 88 169 Tuesday 67 149 \n   184\tWednesday 134 179.4 Wednesday 125 166.8 Wednesday 98 145.8 \n   185\tThursday 156 176 Thursday 144 163.2 Thursday 121  \n   186\tFriday 201 173.2 Friday 190 159 Friday 174  \n   187\t \n   188\t \n   189\t  \n   190\t5 \n   191\t \n   192\tQ9. Peter is working in the Labor Department.  He is working on research which studies the daily expense of \n   193\tlaborers who are working in different districts.  He samples 20 workers, 8 working in Yuen Long and 12 \n   194\tworking in Causeway Bay.  He records their spending on lunch on 1 September 2019 and the results are as \n   195\tfollow: \n   196\t \n   197\t  Yuen Long:  33 35 38 40 48 53 55 62 \n   198\t \n   199\t  Causeway Bay: 43 48 50 54 58 63 74 80 82 88 89 93  \n   200\t \n   201\t(a) Find the sample mean and sample standard deviation of spending on lunch on 1 September 2019 for those \n   202\twho are working in Yuen Long and Causeway Bay respectively. \n   203\t \n   204\t(b) Give a simple comparison on the spending on lunch by workers working in Yuen Long and Causeway Bay \n   205\tby using the result in part (a). \n   206\t \n   207\t(c) For the combined data, find the sample mean, sample standard deviation, and 82\n   208\tth\n   209\t percentile of spending on \n   210\tlunch on 1 September 2019.   \n   211\t \n   212\t \n   213\tQ10. The following is the probability distribution function of the number of customers (X) of a car maintenance \n   214\tshop in a day. \n   215\t \n   216\tx 0 1 2 3 4 \n   217\tP(X = x) 0.1 0.25 k 0.3 0.15 \n   218\t \n   219\t(a)  Find the value of k.            \n   220\t \n   221\t(b) Find E(X) and Var(X).             \n   222\t \n   223\t(c)  The profit Y (in $) of the shop is assumed to follow the function Y = 5000X - 7000. Find E(Y) and Var(Y).  \n   224\t \n   225\t \n   226\tQ11. The time requires to finish a transaction with an ATM machine follows a normal distribution with unknown \n   227\tmean and a population standard deviation of 0.4 minute.  In order to estimate the population mean time \n   228\trequires to finish a transaction with the ATM machine, a random sample of 25 transactions is taken.  The \n   229\tsample mean time is 2.2 minutes. \n   230\t \n   231\t(ai) Construct a 95% confidence interval estimate for the population mean time requires to finish a transaction.\n   232\t           \n   233\t(aii) The researcher suggests doing the study again so that the point estimate should be within 0.08 minute from \n   234\tthe true population mean at the 95% confidence level.  How large should the sample size be?  \n   235\t \n   236\t(b) Another random sample is taken in order to estimate the population proportion of ATM machine users who \n   237\twithdraw more than $1900 in one transaction.  In a sample with 300 randomly selected ATM machine users, \n   238\t45 of them withdraw more than $1900.  Construct a 98% confidence interval estimate for the population \n   239\tproportion of ATM machine users who withdraw more than $1900 in one transaction. \n   240\t  \n   241\t6 \n   242\t \n   243\tQ12. The table shows the sales of televisions set (in thousands) in an electrical appliance shop in year 2012 – 2019. \n   244\t   \n   245\tYear 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 \n   246\tSales \n   247\t(1000s) \n   248\t14.3 15.2 15.7 17.3 19.6 21.4 25.2 26.9 \n   249\t \n   250\t(a) Find the linear regression equation for the trend. Interpret the slope of the line. \n   251\t(b) Use the equation obtained in (a) to forecast the sales of televisions set in year 2021. \n   252\t(c) The time series plot of the quarterly sales in years 2017-2019 is given below. Referring to the time series \n   253\tplot, describe the seasonal variation of the sales of television set.  (In a short paragraph of around 20 words.) \n   254\t \n   255\t  \n   256\t                    \n   257\t(d) Complete the following table and calculate the seasonal variation for Quarter 1, Quarter 2, Quarter 3, and \n   258\tQuarter 4.   \n   259\t \n   260\tYear Quarter Sales \n   261\t(1000) \n   262\tCentered           \n   263\t4-period Moving \n   264\tAverage (1000) \n   265\t2017 1 4.8  \n   266\t2017 2 4.1 \n   267\t2017 3  5.475 \n   268\t2017 4 6.5 5.7375 \n   269\t2018 1 5.8 5.975 \n   270\t2018 2 5.2 6.1875 \n   271\t2018 3 6.8  \n   272\t2018 4 7.4 6.4 \n   273\t2019 1 6 6.5375 \n   274\t2019 2 5.6 6.675 \n   275\t2019 3 7.5  \n   276\t2019 4 7.8 \n   277\t \n   278\t \n   279\t  \n   280\t0\n   281\t1\n   282\t2\n   283\t3\n   284\t4\n   285\t5\n   286\t6\n   287\t7\n   288\t8\n   289\t9\n   290\t123456789101112\n   291\tTime: (2017 Quarter 1 to 2019 Quarter 4)\n   292\tSales of Television Set (1000s)\n   293\t7 \n   294\t \n   295\tQ13. Below are the CPIs for three different European countries from 2016 to 2019:  \n   296\t \n   297\tCountry CPI in 2016 CPI in 2017 CPI in 2018 CPI in 2019 \n   298\tUnited Kingdom 99.4 101.5 104.2 106.3 \n   299\tFrance 99 100.6 101.7 103.1 \n   300\tGermany 99.1 100.8 102 103.3 \n   301\t \n   302\t(a) Which country / countries experienced inflation from 2016 to 2019?        \n   303\t \n   304\t(b)  Calculate the percentage changes in CPIs from 2018 to 2019 for each country.      \n   305\t \n   306\t \n   307\tQ14. Suppose the daily revenue, X (in thousand dollars), of Tin Restaurant is normally distributed with mean 160 \n   308\tand standard deviation 8. \n   309\t \n   310\t(a) What is the probability that Tin Restaurant's revenue is between 140 and 170 thousand dollars in a particular \n   311\tday?                \n   312\t \n   313\t(b) There is an 80% chance that Tin Restaurant's revenue is at least M thousand dollars in a particular day.  What \n   314\tis the value of M?           \n   315\t \n   316\t The daily revenue, Y (in thousand dollars), of Sam Steak House is normally distributed with mean 164 and \n   317\tstandard deviation 15.  Assume the daily revenues of these two companies are independent. \n   318\t \n   319\t(c) Let T (in thousand dollars) be the sum of the revenues of these two companies in a day.  Write down the (i) \n   320\texpectation, (ii) variance, (iii) standard deviation, and (iv) median of T.  \n   321\t \n   322\t(d) Samson is the owner of the two restaurants.  He says that there is a high chance that the total revenue of \n   323\tthese two restaurants would be more than 350 thousand dollars in a day.  Is it true?  Explain your answer \n   324\twith calculation.   \n   325\t  \n   326\t8 \n   327\t \n   328\tUseful Formulae \n   329\t \n   330\tSummary statistics \n   331\t Sample Population \n   332\tMean \n 📋 試卷全面分析

呢份 Elementary Statistics Revision Exercise 涵蓋以下主要 Topics：

Topic #主題對應題目
1Sampling Methods（抽樣方法）Q1(a)
2Summary Statistics（描述統計量）：Mean, Median, Mode, SD, Range, Percentile, IQR, SkewnessQ1(b)(c)(d), Q4, Q9
3Discrete Probability Distribution（離散概率分佈）：E(X), Var(X)Q6, Q10
4Normal Distribution（常態分佈）：Z-score, 反查Q2(a)(b), Q14(a)(b)
5Binomial Distribution（二項分佈）Q2(c)
6Linear Transformation of Random Variables（隨機變量線性變換）Q2(d), Q10(c), Q14(c)(d)
7Price Index（價格指數）：Laspeyres, Paasche, CPIQ3, Q7, Q13
8Confidence Interval（置信區間）：Mean (σ known / unknown), Proportion, Sample SizeQ5, Q11
9Time Series Analysis（時間序列分析）：Trend, Seasonal Variation, Moving AverageQ8, Q12
10Linear Regression（線性回歸）Q12(a)(b)

我哋依家開始！

📘 Topic 1：Sampling Methods（抽樣方法）

對應題目：Q1(a)

🔍 咩係 Sampling（抽樣）？

你唔可能問全世界每一個人嘅意見，所以你揀一部分人嚟代表成個群體，呢個過程就叫 Sampling（抽樣）。

📌 三種你必須識嘅 Sampling Methods：

1️⃣ Simple Random Sampling（簡單隨機抽樣）

  • English Definition: Every member of the population has an equal chance of being selected.
  • 白話解釋：好似抽獎咁，每個人被抽中嘅機會一樣。
  • 例子：Q1(a)(i) — 從所有註冊醫生入面隨機揀 50 個做調查。
  • 記憶口訣：「人人平等，隨機抽」

2️⃣ Stratified Sampling（分層抽樣）

  • English Definition: The population is divided into subgroups (strata) based on a shared characteristic, then random samples are drawn from each stratum.
  • 白話解釋：先分組（例如按部門），再喺每組入面各自隨機抽人。
  • 例子：Q1(a)(ii) — 銀行有 Marketing、Research、Finance 三個部門，分別隨機抽 30、20、50 人。
  • 記憶口訣：「先分層，再抽樣」
  • Strata = 層 / 子群組

3️⃣ Systematic Sampling（系統抽樣）

  • English Definition: Select every k-th member from a list or sequence.
  • 白話解釋：每隔固定人數抽一個，好似排隊每 8 個人揀 1 個咁。
  • 例子：Q1(a)(iii) — 每第 8 個入學校嘅學生就問佢最鍾意邊個老師。
  • 記憶口訣：「每隔 K 個抽一個」

✅ Q1(a) 答案：

情境答案
(i) 隨機揀 50 個醫生Simple Random Sampling
(ii) 按部門各自抽人Stratified Sampling
(iii) 每第 8 個學生Systematic Sampling

🧠 考試 Tips：

  • 見到 「randomly selected from the whole group」 → Simple Random
  • 見到 「divided into groups / departments / categories, then randomly select from each」 → Stratified
  • 見到 「every k-th」 → Systematic

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Topic 2：Summary Statistics（描述統計量）！ 💪

USER:

我到第二題了, 請解說第二題

ASSISTANT:

好！我哋依家直接跳去 Q2，呢題係關於 Normal Distribution（常態分佈），係成個課程最核心嘅題型之一！

📘 Q2：Normal Distribution 常態分佈綜合題

題目背景：

ABC 航空公司由香港飛台灣嘅飛行時間服從 Normal Distribution

  • Mean（平均值）μ = 90 minutes
  • Standard Deviation（標準差）σ = 15 minutes

即係話：X ~ N(90, 15²)

首先，你要識嘅基礎概念：

🔔 咩係 Normal Distribution（常態分佈）？

  • 一個 鐘形曲線（Bell Curve），左右對稱
  • 大部分數據集中喺中間（mean 附近），愈遠愈少
  • 完全由兩個數字決定：μ (mean) 同 σ (standard deviation)

🔑 Z-Score（標準分數）

要用 Normal Table 查概率，你必須將 X 轉換做 Z：

Z=X−μσZ = \frac{X - \mu}{\sigma}Z=σX−μ​

  • Z 嘅意思：呢個數值距離 mean 有幾多個 standard deviation
  • Z ~ N(0, 1)，即係 Standard Normal Distribution

📊 Normal Table 點用？

呢份卷附嘅 Table 比你嘅係：P(0 < Z < z) = 由 0 到 z 之間嘅面積

記住：

  • 成條鐘形曲線嘅總面積 = 1
  • 左半邊 = 0.5，右半邊 = 0.5
  • P(Z < 0) = 0.5

Q2(a)：P(X < 81) = ?

求飛行時間少過 81 分鐘嘅概率

Step 1：計 Z-score

Z=81−9015=−915=−0.6Z = \frac{81 - 90}{15} = \frac{-9}{15} = -0.6Z=1581−90​=15−9​=−0.6

Step 2：查表

我哋要搵 P(Z < -0.6)

因為鐘形曲線對稱：
P(Z<−0.6)=0.5−P(0<Z<0.6)P(Z < -0.6) = 0.5 - P(0 < Z < 0.6)P(Z<−0.6)=0.5−P(0<Z<0.6)

查表：Z = 0.60 → P(0 < Z < 0.6) = 0.2257

P(Z<−0.6)=0.5−0.2257=0.2743P(Z < -0.6) = 0.5 - 0.2257 = \boxed{0.2743}P(Z<−0.6)=0.5−0.2257=0.2743​

🧠 記憶技巧：

  • Z 係負數，即喺 mean 嘅左邊
  • 左邊嘅面積 = 0.5 - 表中查到嘅值

Q2(b)：搵 M，使得 P(X > M) = 0.20

有 20% 機會飛行時間超過 M 分鐘，求 M

Step 1：轉換概率

P(X > M) = 0.20，即 P(X < M) = 0.80

所以 P(0 < Z < z) = 0.80 - 0.50 = 0.30

Step 2：反查表

喺 Normal Table 搵最接近 0.30 嘅值：

  • Z = 0.84 → 0.2995
  • Z = 0.85 → 0.3023

最接近 0.30 嘅係 Z ≈ 0.84

Step 3：轉返做 X

M=μ+Z×σ=90+0.84×15=90+12.6=102.6 minutesM = \mu + Z \times \sigma = 90 + 0.84 \times 15 = 90 + 12.6 = \boxed{102.6 \text{ minutes}}M=μ+Z×σ=90+0.84×15=90+12.6=102.6 minutes​

🧠 記憶技巧：

  • P(X > M) = 0.20 → M 喺 mean 嘅右邊（因為只有 20% 喺佢右邊，即佢偏大）
  • 所以 Z 係正數

Q2(c)：Binomial Distribution 題

隨機抽 20 班機，求剛好 5 班飛行時間少過 81 分鐘嘅概率

關鍵連接：

由 part (a) 我哋知道：P(X < 81) = 0.2743

每班機少過 81 分鐘係一個 「成功」，概率 p = 0.2743

20 班機，每班獨立 → 呢個係 Binomial Distribution！

Let Y=number of flights with time < 81 min\text{Let } Y = \text{number of flights with time < 81 min}Let Y=number of flights with time < 81 min
Y∼Bin(n=20,  p=0.2743)Y \sim Bin(n = 20, \; p = 0.2743)Y∼Bin(n=20,p=0.2743)

公式：

P(Y=5)=(205)×(0.2743)5×(1−0.2743)15P(Y = 5) = \binom{20}{5} \times (0.2743)^5 \times (1 - 0.2743)^{15}P(Y=5)=(520​)×(0.2743)5×(1−0.2743)15

=(205)×(0.2743)5×(0.7257)15= \binom{20}{5} \times (0.2743)^5 \times (0.7257)^{15}=(520​)×(0.2743)5×(0.7257)15

計算：

(205)=20!5!×15!=15504\binom{20}{5} = \frac{20!}{5! \times 15!} = 15504(520​)=5!×15!20!​=15504

(0.2743)5≈0.001553(0.2743)^5 \approx 0.001553(0.2743)5≈0.001553

(0.7257)15≈0.01026(0.7257)^{15} \approx 0.01026(0.7257)15≈0.01026

P(Y=5)=15504×0.001553×0.01026≈0.2470P(Y = 5) = 15504 \times 0.001553 \times 0.01026 \approx \boxed{0.2470}P(Y=5)=15504×0.001553×0.01026≈0.2470​

🧠 Binomial Distribution 快速回顧：

元素意思
n試驗次數（20 班機）
p每次「成功」嘅概率（0.2743）
x想要嘅成功次數（5）
Bin(n, p)Binomial Distribution
nCxCombination，即 n 揀 x 嘅組合數

用 Binomial 嘅條件：

  1. 固定次數 n
  2. 每次只有兩個結果（成功/失敗）
  3. 每次概率 p 相同
  4. 各次獨立

Q2(d)：Linear Transformation（線性變換）

升級後，飛行時間減少 8%，即新時間 = 原時間 × 0.92
求新嘅 (i) Expectation 同 (ii) Standard Deviation

概念：

如果 Y = aX + b，咁：

  • E(Y) = a × E(X) + b
  • SD(Y) = |a| × SD(X)

呢度：升級後時間 = 0.92X（即 a = 0.92, b = 0）

(i) Expectation:

E(0.92X)=0.92×E(X)=0.92×90=82.8 minutesE(0.92X) = 0.92 \times E(X) = 0.92 \times 90 = \boxed{82.8 \text{ minutes}}E(0.92X)=0.92×E(X)=0.92×90=82.8 minutes​

(ii) Standard Deviation:

SD(0.92X)=0.92×SD(X)=0.92×15=13.8 minutesSD(0.92X) = 0.92 \times SD(X) = 0.92 \times 15 = \boxed{13.8 \text{ minutes}}SD(0.92X)=0.92×SD(X)=0.92×15=13.8 minutes​

🧠 超重要記憶：

變換 Y = aX + bE(Y)SD(Y)Var(Y)
公式aE(X) + b|a| × SD(X)a² × Var(X)
加減常數 b影響 mean唔影響 SD唔影響 Var
乘除常數 a影響 mean影響 SD影響 Var
  • 「減少 8%」= 乘以 (1 - 0.08) = 0.92
  • 記住：SD 同 Var 唔受加減影響，但受乘除影響！

📝 Q2 總結 Short Notes：

Part考點核心公式/概念
(a)Normal → Z-score → 查表Z = (X - μ) / σ
(b)反查 Normal Table由概率搵 Z，再搵 X = μ + Zσ
(c)Normal + Binomial 結合用 (a) 嘅概率做 Binomial 嘅 p
(d)Linear TransformationE(aX) = aE(X), SD(aX) = |a|SD(X)

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Q3：Price Index（價格指數）！📊

USER:

第三題

ASSISTANT:

好！我哋依家去 Q3，呢題係關於 Price Index（價格指數），具體考 Paasche Price Index 同 Laspeyres Price Index！

📘 Q3：Price Index（價格指數）

題目背景：

201920202021
ItemsPriceQuantityPriceQuantityPriceQuantity
Apple5.024.75.625.75.820.4
Orange5.515.55.814.35.416.1
Pear6.810.57.711.28.012.3
Strawberry14.235.618.036.517.534.5

首先，你要識嘅基礎概念：

🔍 咩係 Price Index（價格指數）？

  • 用嚟比較唔同年份嘅價格水平
  • 以某一年做 Base Year（基期），設為 100
  • 如果 Index > 100 → 價格上升咗（通脹 Inflation）
  • 如果 Index < 100 → 價格下降咗（通縮 Deflation）
  • 如果 Index = 100 → 價格冇變

📌 兩種 Price Index 你一定要識分：

1️⃣ Laspeyres Price Index（拉氏價格指數）

PIL=∑q0×pt∑q0×p0×100PI_L = \frac{\sum q_0 \times p_t}{\sum q_0 \times p_0} \times 100PIL​=∑q0​×p0​∑q0​×pt​​×100

  • 用 Base Year 嘅 Quantity（q₀） 做權重
  • 白話解釋：「如果買嘅數量同以前一樣，價格變咗幾多？」
  • 記憶口訣：Laspeyres = Last year's quantity = 用舊年（Base Year）嘅數量

2️⃣ Paasche Price Index（帕氏價格指數）

PIP=∑qt×pt∑qt×p0×100PI_P = \frac{\sum q_t \times p_t}{\sum q_t \times p_0} \times 100PIP​=∑qt​×p0​∑qt​×pt​​×100

  • 用 Current Year 嘅 Quantity（qₜ） 做權重
  • 白話解釋：「用而家買嘅數量，價格比以前貴咗幾多？」
  • 記憶口訣：Paasche = Present quantity = 用今年（Current Year）嘅數量

🧠 超重要分辨技巧：

LaspeyresPaasche
Quantity 用邊年？Base Year（q₀）Current Year（qₜ）
分子q₀ × pₜqₜ × pₜ
分母q₀ × p₀qₜ × p₀
記法L = 舊數量P = 新數量

兩個公式嘅共同點：

  • 分子永遠用 current year price (pₜ)
  • 分母永遠用 base year price (p₀)
  • 最後都要 × 100

Q3(a)：Paasche Price Index for 2020, Base Year = 2019

Base Year = 2019 → p₀ = 2019 price, q₀ = 2019 quantity
Current Year = 2020 → pₜ = 2020 price, qₜ = 2020 quantity

Paasche 用 Current Year（2020）嘅 Quantity！

Step 1：計分子 Σ(qₜ × pₜ) — 2020 Quantity × 2020 Price

Itemq₂₀₂₀p₂₀₂₀qₜ × pₜ
Apple25.75.625.7 × 5.6 = 143.92
Orange14.35.814.3 × 5.8 = 82.94
Pear11.27.711.2 × 7.7 = 86.24
Strawberry36.518.036.5 × 18.0 = 657.00

∑qt×pt=143.92+82.94+86.24+657.00=970.10\sum q_t \times p_t = 143.92 + 82.94 + 86.24 + 657.00 = \mathbf{970.10}∑qt​×pt​=143.92+82.94+86.24+657.00=970.10

Step 2：計分母 Σ(qₜ × p₀) — 2020 Quantity × 2019 Price

Itemq₂₀₂₀p₂₀₁₉qₜ × p₀
Apple25.75.025.7 × 5.0 = 128.50
Orange14.35.514.3 × 5.5 = 78.65
Pear11.26.811.2 × 6.8 = 76.16
Strawberry36.514.236.5 × 14.2 = 518.30

∑qt×p0=128.50+78.65+76.16+518.30=801.61\sum q_t \times p_0 = 128.50 + 78.65 + 76.16 + 518.30 = \mathbf{801.61}∑qt​×p0​=128.50+78.65+76.16+518.30=801.61

Step 3：計 Paasche Price Index

PIP=970.10801.61×100=121.02PI_P = \frac{970.10}{801.61} \times 100 = \boxed{121.02}PIP​=801.61970.10​×100=121.02​

✍️ Interpretation（解讀）：

"Based on the Paasche Price Index, the overall price level of the four fruit items in 2020 has increased by approximately 21.02% compared to the base year 2019, using 2020 quantities as weights."

解讀公式：Index - 100 = 升幅百分比

  • 121.02 - 100 = 21.02% increase

Q3(b)：Laspeyres Price Index for 2021, Base Year = 2020

Base Year = 2020 → p₀ = 2020 price, q₀ = 2020 quantity
Current Year = 2021 → pₜ = 2021 price

Laspeyres 用 Base Year（2020）嘅 Quantity！

Step 1：計分子 Σ(q₀ × pₜ) — 2020 Quantity × 2021 Price

Itemq₂₀₂₀p₂₀₂₁q₀ × pₜ
Apple25.75.825.7 × 5.8 = 149.06
Orange14.35.414.3 × 5.4 = 77.22
Pear11.28.011.2 × 8.0 = 89.60
Strawberry36.517.536.5 × 17.5 = 638.75

∑q0×pt=149.06+77.22+89.60+638.75=954.63\sum q_0 \times p_t = 149.06 + 77.22 + 89.60 + 638.75 = \mathbf{954.63}∑q0​×pt​=149.06+77.22+89.60+638.75=954.63

Step 2：計分母 Σ(q₀ × p₀) — 2020 Quantity × 2020 Price

Itemq₂₀₂₀p₂₀₂₀q₀ × p₀
Apple25.75.625.7 × 5.6 = 143.92
Orange14.35.814.3 × 5.8 = 82.94
Pear11.27.711.2 × 7.7 = 86.24
Strawberry36.518.036.5 × 18.0 = 657.00

∑q0×p0=143.92+82.94+86.24+657.00=970.10\sum q_0 \times p_0 = 143.92 + 82.94 + 86.24 + 657.00 = \mathbf{970.10}∑q0​×p0​=143.92+82.94+86.24+657.00=970.10

Step 3：計 Laspeyres Price Index

PIL=954.63970.10×100=98.41PI_L = \frac{954.63}{970.10} \times 100 = \boxed{98.41}PIL​=970.10954.63​×100=98.41​

✍️ Interpretation（解讀）：

"Based on the Laspeyres Price Index, the overall price level of the four fruit items in 2021 has decreased by approximately 1.59% compared to the base year 2020, using 2020 quantities as weights."

  • 98.41 - 100 = -1.59% → 價格整體下降咗

📝 Q3 總結 Short Notes：

Laspeyres (L)Paasche (P)
QuantityBase Year q₀Current Year qₜ
分子Σ q₀ × pₜΣ qₜ × pₜ
分母Σ q₀ × p₀Σ qₜ × p₀
記法L = 舊 (Last) 數量P = 新 (Present) 數量

🧠 Interpretation 模板（考試直接用）：

"Based on the [Laspeyres / Paasche] Price Index, the overall price level in [current year] has [increased / decreased] by approximately [Index - 100]% compared to the base year [base year], using [base year / current year] quantities as weights."

⚠️ 考試常見陷阱：

  1. 睇清楚邊年做 Base Year！ 唔一定係最早嗰年
  2. Laspeyres 同 Paasche 唔好撈亂 — 記住 L=舊數量、P=新數量
  3. 最後一定要 × 100
  4. Interpretation 一定要寫，唔好淨係寫個數字

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Q4：Descriptive Statistics（描述統計量 — Mean, SD, Range, IQR, Skewness）！📊

ASSISTANT:

USER:

Q4

ASSISTANT:

好！我哋依家去 Q4，呢題係關於 Descriptive Statistics（描述統計量），包括 Mean、Standard Deviation、Range、IQR 同 Skewness！呢啲係統計學最基本但最常考嘅嘢！

📘 Q4：Descriptive Statistics（描述統計量）

題目背景：

隨機抽取 12 套戲嘅片長（分鐘）：

120, 96, 131, 105, 108, 93, 99, 102, 106, 115, 121, 146

首先，最重要嘅一步：排序！

做任何 descriptive statistics 之前，一定要先將數據由細到大排列：

93,  96,  99,  102,  105,  106,  108,  115,  120,  121,  131,  14693, \; 96, \; 99, \; 102, \; 105, \; 106, \; 108, \; 115, \; 120, \; 121, \; 131, \; 14693,96,99,102,105,106,108,115,120,121,131,146

n = 12（共 12 個數據）

Q4(a)：Sample Mean 同 Sample Standard Deviation

📌 Sample Mean（樣本平均值）

xˉ=∑xn\bar{x} = \frac{\sum x}{n}xˉ=n∑x​

白話解釋：全部加埋再除以個數

∑x=93+96+99+102+105+106+108+115+120+121+131+146\sum x = 93 + 96 + 99 + 102 + 105 + 106 + 108 + 115 + 120 + 121 + 131 + 146∑x=93+96+99+102+105+106+108+115+120+121+131+146

=1342= \mathbf{1342}=1342

xˉ=134212=111.83 minutes\bar{x} = \frac{1342}{12} = \boxed{111.83 \text{ minutes}}xˉ=121342​=111.83 minutes​

📌 Sample Standard Deviation（樣本標準差）

s=∑x2−nxˉ2n−1s = \sqrt{\frac{\sum x^2 - n\bar{x}^2}{n - 1}}s=n−1∑x2−nxˉ2​​

白話解釋：衡量數據有幾「散」，SD 越大 → 數據越分散

Step 1：計 Σx²

xx²
938,649
969,216
999,801
10210,404
10511,025
10611,236
10811,664
11513,225
12014,400
12114,641
13117,161
14621,316

∑x2=8649+9216+9801+10404+11025+11236+11664+13225+14400+14641+17161+21316\sum x^2 = 8649 + 9216 + 9801 + 10404 + 11025 + 11236 + 11664 + 13225 + 14400 + 14641 + 17161 + 21316∑x2=8649+9216+9801+10404+11025+11236+11664+13225+14400+14641+17161+21316

=152,738= \mathbf{152{,}738}=152,738

Step 2：代入公式

s=152,738−12×(111.83)212−1s = \sqrt{\frac{152{,}738 - 12 \times (111.83)^2}{12 - 1}}s=12−1152,738−12×(111.83)2​​

先計 nxˉ2n\bar{x}^2nxˉ2：

12×(111.83)2=12×12,505.95=150,071.3912 \times (111.83)^2 = 12 \times 12{,}505.95 = 150{,}071.3912×(111.83)2=12×12,505.95=150,071.39

s=152,738−150,071.3911=2,666.6111=242.42=15.57 minutess = \sqrt{\frac{152{,}738 - 150{,}071.39}{11}} = \sqrt{\frac{2{,}666.61}{11}} = \sqrt{242.42} = \boxed{15.57 \text{ minutes}}s=11152,738−150,071.39​​=112,666.61​​=242.42​=15.57 minutes​

🧠 記憶技巧：

符號意思
xˉ\bar{x}xˉSample Mean（樣本平均）
sssSample Standard Deviation（樣本標準差）
nnnSample size（樣本大小）
分母用 n - 1因為係 Sample SD（唔係 Population SD）

⚠️ 考試陷阱：Sample SD 分母係 n - 1，Population SD 分母先係 n！

Q4(b)：Range 同 Inter-Quartile Range (IQR)

📌 Range（全距）

Range=Maximum−Minimum\text{Range} = \text{Maximum} - \text{Minimum}Range=Maximum−Minimum

白話解釋：最大減最細，睇數據嘅「跨度」

Range=146−93=53 minutes\text{Range} = 146 - 93 = \boxed{53 \text{ minutes}}Range=146−93=53 minutes​

簡單到爆！

📌 Inter-Quartile Range, IQR（四分位距）

IQR=Q3−Q1IQR = Q_3 - Q_1IQR=Q3​−Q1​

白話解釋：中間 50% 數據嘅跨度，比 Range 更加穩定（唔受極端值影響）

首先要搵 Q1 同 Q3：

排好序嘅數據（n = 12）：

93,  96,  99⏟下半部,  102,  105,  106⏟,  108,  115,  120⏟,  121,  131,  146⏟上半部\underbrace{93, \; 96, \; 99}_{下半部}, \; \underbrace{102, \; 105, \; 106}_{}, \; \underbrace{108, \; 115, \; 120}_{}, \; \underbrace{121, \; 131, \; 146}_{上半部}下半部93,96,99​​,102,105,106​​,108,115,120​​,上半部121,131,146​​

搵 Q1（第 25th percentile）：

位置公式：Q1Q_1Q1​ position = 14(n+1)=14(13)=3.25\frac{1}{4}(n+1) = \frac{1}{4}(13) = 3.2541​(n+1)=41​(13)=3.25

即第 3 個同第 4 個數之間，偏向第 4 個（0.25 嘅比例）

Q1=x3+0.25×(x4−x3)=99+0.25×(102−99)=99+0.75=99.75Q_1 = x_3 + 0.25 \times (x_4 - x_3) = 99 + 0.25 \times (102 - 99) = 99 + 0.75 = \boxed{99.75}Q1​=x3​+0.25×(x4​−x3​)=99+0.25×(102−99)=99+0.75=99.75​

搵 Q3（第 75th percentile）：

位置公式：Q3Q_3Q3​ position = 34(n+1)=34(13)=9.75\frac{3}{4}(n+1) = \frac{3}{4}(13) = 9.7543​(n+1)=43​(13)=9.75

即第 9 個同第 10 個數之間，偏向第 10 個（0.75 嘅比例）

Q3=x9+0.75×(x10−x9)=120+0.75×(121−120)=120+0.75=120.75Q_3 = x_9 + 0.75 \times (x_{10} - x_9) = 120 + 0.75 \times (121 - 120) = 120 + 0.75 = \boxed{120.75}Q3​=x9​+0.75×(x10​−x9​)=120+0.75×(121−120)=120+0.75=120.75​

搵 Q2 / Median（第 50th percentile）：

位置公式：Q2Q_2Q2​ position = 24(n+1)=24(13)=6.5\frac{2}{4}(n+1) = \frac{2}{4}(13) = 6.542​(n+1)=42​(13)=6.5

即第 6 個同第 7 個數嘅中間

Q2=x6+x72=106+1082=107Q_2 = \frac{x_6 + x_7}{2} = \frac{106 + 108}{2} = \boxed{107}Q2​=2x6​+x7​​=2106+108​=107​

（Q2 之後 part (c) 要用！）

計 IQR：

IQR=Q3−Q1=120.75−99.75=21 minutesIQR = Q_3 - Q_1 = 120.75 - 99.75 = \boxed{21 \text{ minutes}}IQR=Q3​−Q1​=120.75−99.75=21 minutes​

🧠 Quartile 位置公式速記：

Quartile位置
Q₁14(n+1)\frac{1}{4}(n+1)41​(n+1)
Q₂ (Median)24(n+1)\frac{2}{4}(n+1)42​(n+1)
Q₃34(n+1)\frac{3}{4}(n+1)43​(n+1)

如果位置係小數（例如 3.25），就要做 interpolation（插值）：
Q=x整數位+小數部分×(x下一個−x整數位)Q = x_{整數位} + 小數部分 \times (x_{下一個} - x_{整數位})Q=x整數位​+小數部分×(x下一個​−x整數位​)

Q4(c)：Skewness（偏態）

Comment on the skewness by comparing the quartiles.

📌 咩係 Skewness（偏態）？

類型圖形特徵
Positively Skewed（正偏）尾巴向右拖 →Q₃ - Q₂ > Q₂ - Q₁
Negatively Skewed（負偏）← 尾巴向左拖Q₃ - Q₂ < Q₂ - Q₁
Symmetric（對稱）左右對稱Q₃ - Q₂ = Q₂ - Q₁

白話解釋：

  • 正偏：大部分數據偏細，但有幾個好大嘅值將條尾拉去右邊
  • 負偏：大部分數據偏大，但有幾個好細嘅值將條尾拉去左邊

計算：

Q3−Q2=120.75−107=13.75Q_3 - Q_2 = 120.75 - 107 = \mathbf{13.75}Q3​−Q2​=120.75−107=13.75

Q2−Q1=107−99.75=7.25Q_2 - Q_1 = 107 - 99.75 = \mathbf{7.25}Q2​−Q1​=107−99.75=7.25

比較：

Q3−Q2=13.75>Q2−Q1=7.25Q_3 - Q_2 = 13.75 > Q_2 - Q_1 = 7.25Q3​−Q2​=13.75>Q2​−Q1​=7.25

✍️ 答案：

"Since Q₃ - Q₂ (13.75) > Q₂ - Q₁ (7.25), the data is positively skewed (skewed to the right). This means the upper half of the data is more spread out than the lower half, indicating that there are some movies with relatively long durations pulling the distribution to the right."

🧠 Skewness 記憶大法：

比較 (Q3−Q2) 同 (Q2−Q1)\text{比較 } (Q_3 - Q_2) \text{ 同 } (Q_2 - Q_1)比較 (Q3​−Q2​) 同 (Q2​−Q1​)

情況結論
Q₃ - Q₂ > Q₂ - Q₁Positive skew ➡️ 右邊較散
Q₃ - Q₂ < Q₂ - Q₁Negative skew ⬅️ 左邊較散
Q₃ - Q₂ = Q₂ - Q₁Symmetric ↔️ 對稱

口訣：「右大正偏，左大負偏」

  • 右邊（Q₃那邊）距離大 → Positive
  • 左邊（Q₁那邊）距離大 → Negative

📝 Q4 完整總結：

Part答案考點
(a) Mean111.83 minΣx ÷ n
(a) SD15.57 min用 n-1（Sample SD）
(b) Range53 minMax - Min
(b) IQR21 minQ₃ - Q₁
(c) SkewnessPositively skewedQ₃-Q₂ > Q₂-Q₁

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Q5：Confidence Interval（置信區間）！📈

USER:

Q5

ASSISTANT:

好！我哋依家去 Q5，呢題係關於 Confidence Interval（置信區間），分兩個情境：一個係估 population mean（總體平均值），一個係估 population proportion（總體比例）。呢個係考試必考嘅重點！

📘 Q5：Confidence Interval（置信區間）

首先，你要識嘅基礎概念：

🔍 咩係 Confidence Interval（置信區間）？

  • 我哋唔可能知道成個 population 嘅真正 mean 或 proportion
  • 所以我哋用 sample data 去估計一個範圍，話「真正嘅值好大機會落喺呢個範圍入面」
  • 白話解釋：「我有 90%（或 95%）信心，真正嘅答案喺呢個範圍之內」

📌 Confidence Interval 嘅通用格式：

Point Estimate±Margin of Error\text{Point Estimate} \pm \text{Margin of Error}Point Estimate±Margin of Error

即係：

估計值±（Critical Value × Standard Error）\text{估計值} \pm \text{（Critical Value × Standard Error）}估計值±（Critical Value × Standard Error）

🧠 超重要：用 Z 定 t？

情況用邊個？條件
σ 已知 (known)Z任何 sample size
σ 未知 (unknown)，用 s 代替t通常 n 較細
估 proportionZ永遠用 Z

記憶口訣：

  • σ known → Z
  • σ unknown → t（因為多咗一層唔確定性）
  • Proportion → Z（永遠）

Q5(a)：Confidence Interval for Population Mean（σ unknown → 用 t）

題目資料：

  • Blood test time ~ Normal Distribution
  • σ unknown（未知），用 sample SD 代替
  • Sample size: n = 28
  • Sample mean: x̄ = 130 minutes
  • Sample standard deviation: s = 25 minutes
  • 要求：90% Confidence Interval

📌 公式（σ unknown）：

xˉ±tα/2,  n−1×sn\bar{x} \pm t_{\alpha/2, \; n-1} \times \frac{s}{\sqrt{n}}xˉ±tα/2,n−1​×n​s​

符號意思數值
xˉ\bar{x}xˉSample Mean130
sssSample Standard Deviation25
nnnSample Size28
n−1n - 1n−1Degrees of Freedom（自由度）27
α\alphaα1 - Confidence Level = 1 - 0.90 = 0.100.10
α/2\alpha/2α/2兩邊各分一半0.05
tα/2,  n−1t_{\alpha/2, \; n-1}tα/2,n−1​t-table 查到嘅 critical value要查表

Step 1：搵 Critical Value t0.05,  27t_{0.05, \; 27}t0.05,27​

查 t-table：

  • Degrees of freedom (df) = 27
  • α/2 = 0.05（即上尾面積 0.05）

t0.05,  27=1.703t_{0.05, \; 27} = \mathbf{1.703}t0.05,27​=1.703

Step 2：計 Standard Error

SE=sn=2528=255.2915=4.7245SE = \frac{s}{\sqrt{n}} = \frac{25}{\sqrt{28}} = \frac{25}{5.2915} = \mathbf{4.7245}SE=n​s​=28​25​=5.291525​=4.7245

Step 3：計 Margin of Error

ME=t×SE=1.703×4.7245=8.04ME = t \times SE = 1.703 \times 4.7245 = \mathbf{8.04}ME=t×SE=1.703×4.7245=8.04

Step 4：計 Confidence Interval

xˉ±ME=130±8.04\bar{x} \pm ME = 130 \pm 8.04xˉ±ME=130±8.04

=(130−8.04,    130+8.04)= (130 - 8.04, \;\; 130 + 8.04)=(130−8.04,130+8.04)

=(121.96,    138.04) minutes= \boxed{(121.96, \;\; 138.04) \text{ minutes}}=(121.96,138.04) minutes​

✍️ Interpretation（解讀）：

"We are 90% confident that the population mean time required to finish the blood test is between 121.96 minutes and 138.04 minutes."

🧠 點解用 t 唔用 Z？

因為題目話 "unknown standard deviation"（σ 未知），我哋用 sample SD (s = 25) 嚟代替，所以要用 t-distribution！

Q5(b)：Confidence Interval for Population Proportion（永遠用 Z）

題目資料：

  • Sample size: n = 200
  • Defective items: 25
  • Sample proportion: p̂ = 25/200 = 0.125
  • 要求：95% Confidence Interval

📌 公式（Proportion）：

p^±Zα/2×p^(1−p^)n\hat{p} \pm Z_{\alpha/2} \times \sqrt{\frac{\hat{p}(1 - \hat{p})}{n}}p^​±Zα/2​×np^​(1−p^​)​​

符號意思數值
p^\hat{p}p^​Sample Proportion（樣本比例）25/200 = 0.125
1−p^1 - \hat{p}1−p^​0.875
nnnSample Size200
α\alphaα1 - 0.95 = 0.050.05
α/2\alpha/2α/20.025
Zα/2Z_{\alpha/2}Zα/2​Z-table 查到嘅 critical value要查表

Step 1：搵 Critical Value Z0.025Z_{0.025}Z0.025​

95% Confidence Level 嘅 Z 值係考試必背嘅：

Z0.025=1.96Z_{0.025} = \mathbf{1.96}Z0.025​=1.96

🧠 必背 Z 值：

Confidence Levelαα/2Z value
90%0.100.051.645
95%0.050.0251.96
99%0.010.0052.576

呢三個一定要背熟！

Step 2：計 Standard Error

SE=p^(1−p^)n=0.125×0.875200=0.109375200=0.000547=0.02339SE = \sqrt{\frac{\hat{p}(1 - \hat{p})}{n}} = \sqrt{\frac{0.125 \times 0.875}{200}} = \sqrt{\frac{0.109375}{200}} = \sqrt{0.000547} = \mathbf{0.02339}SE=np^​(1−p^​)​​=2000.125×0.875​​=2000.109375​​=0.000547​=0.02339

Step 3：計 Margin of Error

ME=Z×SE=1.96×0.02339=0.04585ME = Z \times SE = 1.96 \times 0.02339 = \mathbf{0.04585}ME=Z×SE=1.96×0.02339=0.04585

Step 4：計 Confidence Interval

p^±ME=0.125±0.04585\hat{p} \pm ME = 0.125 \pm 0.04585p^​±ME=0.125±0.04585

=(0.125−0.04585,    0.125+0.04585)= (0.125 - 0.04585, \;\; 0.125 + 0.04585)=(0.125−0.04585,0.125+0.04585)

=(0.0792,    0.1709)= \boxed{(0.0792, \;\; 0.1709)}=(0.0792,0.1709)​

即大約 (7.92%, 17.09%)

✍️ Interpretation（解讀）：

"We are 95% confident that the population proportion of defective items is between 0.0792 (7.92%) and 0.1709 (17.09%)."

📝 Q5 完整總結 — Confidence Interval 兩大公式：

公式 1：估 Population Mean

σ Known（已知）σ Unknown（未知）
公式xˉ±Zα/2×σn\bar{x} \pm Z_{\alpha/2} \times \frac{\sigma}{\sqrt{n}}xˉ±Zα/2​×n​σ​xˉ±tα/2,n−1×sn\bar{x} \pm t_{\alpha/2, n-1} \times \frac{s}{\sqrt{n}}xˉ±tα/2,n−1​×n​s​
用邊個分佈Zt
SEσn\frac{\sigma}{\sqrt{n}}n​σ​sn\frac{s}{\sqrt{n}}n​s​

公式 2：估 Population Proportion

p^±Zα/2×p^(1−p^)n\hat{p} \pm Z_{\alpha/2} \times \sqrt{\frac{\hat{p}(1-\hat{p})}{n}}p^​±Zα/2​×np^​(1−p^​)​​

永遠用 Z！

🧠 考試做題流程（每次都跟呢個步驟）：

TEXT
Step 1：判斷用 Z 定 t
Step 2：搵 Critical Value（查表或背）
Step 3：計 Standard Error (SE)
Step 4：計 Margin of Error (ME) = Critical Value × SE
Step 5：CI = Point Estimate ± ME
Step 6：寫 Interpretation！

⚠️ 常見陷阱：

  1. σ unknown 一定用 t，唔好用 Z！
  2. t-distribution 要寫 degrees of freedom = n - 1
  3. Proportion 永遠用 Z，唔好用 t
  4. Interpretation 一定要寫，好多學生淨係計數唔寫解讀會扣分
  5. 90% CI 用 1.645，95% 用 1.96，99% 用 2.576 — 背熟佢！

(Just state your answer, \n   143\tno calculation is needed in part (d)).   \n   144\t  \n   145\t4 \n   146\t \n   147\tQ8.        \n   148\t \n   149\tThe following table shows the daily number of customers in a post office in 3 weeks. \n   150\t \n   151\t \n   152\t Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday \n   153\tWeek 1 304 102 134 156 201 \n   154\tWeek 2 287 88 125 144 190 \n   155\tWeek 3 269 67 98 121 174 \n   156\t \n   157\t \n   158\tNumber of customers \n   159\t \n   160\t \n   161\t(a) Describe the trend and seasonal variation of the number of customers by referring to the above time series \n   162\tplot.                    \n   163\t \n   164\t(b) Find the seasonal variation for Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday and Friday respectively by using the \n   165\tbelow 5-period moving average table.            \n   166\t \n   167\tWeek 1 Original \n   168\tData \n   169\t5-point \n   170\tMoving \n   171\tAverage \n   172\tWeek 2 Original \n   173\tData \n   174\t5-point \n   175\tMoving \n   176\tAverage \n   177\tWeek 3 Original \n   178\tData \n   179\t5-point \n   180\tMoving \n   181\tAverage \n   182\tMonday 304  Monday 287 171.4 Monday 269 153.6 \n   183\tTuesday 102  Tuesday 88 169 Tuesday 67 149 \n   184\tWednesday 134 179.4 Wednesday 125 166.8 Wednesday 98 145.8 \n   185\tThursday 156 176 Thursday 144 163.2 Thursday 121  \n   186\tFriday 201 173.2 Friday 190 159 Friday 174  \n   187\t \n   188\t \n   189\t  \n   190\t5 \n   191\t \n   192\tQ9. Find E(Y) and Var(Y).  \n   224\t \n   225\t \n   226\tQ11. The time requires to finish a transaction with an ATM machine follows a normal distribution with unknown \n   227\tmean and a population standard deviation of 0.4 minute.  In order to estimate the population mean time \n   228\trequires to finish a transaction with the ATM machine, a random sample of 25 transactions is taken.  The \n   229\tsample mean time is 2.2 minutes. \n   230\t \n   231\t(ai) Construct a 95% confidence interval estimate for the population mean time requires to finish a transaction.\n   232\t           \n   233\t(aii) The researcher suggests doing the study again so that the point estimate should be within 0.08 minute from \n   234\tthe true population mean at the 95% confidence level. Construct a 98% confidence interval estimate for the population \n   239\tproportion of ATM machine users who withdraw more than $1900 in one transaction. \n   240\t  \n   241\t6 \n   242\t \n   243\tQ12. The table shows the sales of televisions set (in thousands) in an electrical appliance shop in year 2012 – 2019. \n   244\t   \n   245\tYear 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 \n   246\tSales \n   247\t(1000s) \n   248\t14.3 15.2 15.7 17.3 19.6 21.4 25.2 26.9 \n   249\t \n   250\t(a) Find the linear regression equation for the trend. Interpret the slope of the line. ",

好，我已經讀到 Q6 嘅完整內容。依家開始教你！

📘 Q6：Discrete Probability Distribution（離散概率分佈）

題目背景：

一個小城市每日交通意外數量 X 嘅概率分佈如下：

x012345
P(X = x)0.10.20.450.150.05k

首先，你要識嘅基礎概念：

🔍 咩係 Probability Distribution Function（概率分佈函數）？

  • 列出一個 random variable（隨機變量）嘅所有可能值同埋每個值嘅概率
  • 白話解釋：好似一張表，話你知每個結果出現嘅機會有幾大

📌 最重要嘅規則：

∑All Probabilities=1\sum \text{All Probabilities} = 1∑All Probabilities=1

即係所有概率加埋一定等於 1！（因為所有可能性加埋 = 100%）

同埋每個概率都要 ≥ 0

Q6(a)：Find the value of k

所有概率加埋 = 1

0.1+0.2+0.45+0.15+0.05+k=10.1 + 0.2 + 0.45 + 0.15 + 0.05 + k = 10.1+0.2+0.45+0.15+0.05+k=1

0.95+k=10.95 + k = 10.95+k=1

k=0.05\boxed{k = 0.05}k=0.05​

就係咁簡單！

Q6(b)：Compute E(X)（期望值）

📌 咩係 E(X)？Expected Value（期望值）

  • 公式：

E(X)=∑x⋅P(X=x)E(X) = \sum x \cdot P(X = x)E(X)=∑x⋅P(X=x)

  • 白話解釋：每個值乘以佢嘅概率，再全部加埋。可以理解為**「長期嘅平均值」**
  • 例如：如果你每日記錄交通意外數，記錄好多好多日之後，平均每日幾多宗？答案就係 E(X)

計算：

完整嘅表：

xP(X = x)x × P(X = x)
00.100 × 0.10 = 0
10.201 × 0.20 = 0.20
20.452 × 0.45 = 0.90
30.153 × 0.15 = 0.45
40.054 × 0.05 = 0.20
50.055 × 0.05 = 0.25

E(X)=0+0.20+0.90+0.45+0.20+0.25=2.0E(X) = 0 + 0.20 + 0.90 + 0.45 + 0.20 + 0.25 = \boxed{2.0}E(X)=0+0.20+0.90+0.45+0.20+0.25=2.0​

解讀：平均每日有 2 宗交通意外。

Q6(c)：Compute Var(X) and σ(X)

📌 咩係 Var(X)？Variance（方差）

  • 衡量數據有幾分散
  • 公式：

Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2Var(X) = E(X^2) - [E(X)]^2Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2

白話解釋：先計「平方嘅平均」，再減去「平均嘅平方」

📌 咩係 σ(X)？Standard Deviation（標準差）

σ(X)=Var(X)\sigma(X) = \sqrt{Var(X)}σ(X)=Var(X)​

Step 1：計 E(X²)

xx²P(X = x)x² × P(X = x)
000.100 × 0.10 = 0
110.201 × 0.20 = 0.20
240.454 × 0.45 = 1.80
390.159 × 0.15 = 1.35
4160.0516 × 0.05 = 0.80
5250.0525 × 0.05 = 1.25

E(X2)=0+0.20+1.80+1.35+0.80+1.25=5.40E(X^2) = 0 + 0.20 + 1.80 + 1.35 + 0.80 + 1.25 = \mathbf{5.40}E(X2)=0+0.20+1.80+1.35+0.80+1.25=5.40

Step 2：計 Var(X)

Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2=5.40−(2.0)2=5.40−4.00=1.40Var(X) = E(X^2) - [E(X)]^2 = 5.40 - (2.0)^2 = 5.40 - 4.00 = \boxed{1.40}Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2=5.40−(2.0)2=5.40−4.00=1.40​

Step 3：計 σ(X)

σ(X)=Var(X)=1.40=1.1832\sigma(X) = \sqrt{Var(X)} = \sqrt{1.40} = \boxed{1.1832}σ(X)=Var(X)​=1.40​=1.1832​

🧠 Var(X) 公式記憶口訣：

Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2Var(X) = E(X^2) - [E(X)]^2Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2

「平方嘅期望 減 期望嘅平方」

呢個口訣一定要背！考試必用！

Q6(d)：30 日內，預期有幾多日多過 3 宗意外？

Within a month (30 days), how many days are expected to have more than 3 accidents?

Step 1：搵 P(X > 3)

「多過 3」即係 X = 4 或 X = 5：

P(X>3)=P(X=4)+P(X=5)=0.05+0.05=0.10P(X > 3) = P(X = 4) + P(X = 5) = 0.05 + 0.05 = \mathbf{0.10}P(X>3)=P(X=4)+P(X=5)=0.05+0.05=0.10

Step 2：30 日 × 概率

Expected number of days=30×P(X>3)=30×0.10=3 days\text{Expected number of days} = 30 \times P(X > 3) = 30 \times 0.10 = \boxed{3 \text{ days}}Expected number of days=30×P(X>3)=30×0.10=3 days​

白話解釋：

喺 30 日入面，預期有 3 日會有多過 3 宗交通意外。

🧠 呢類題嘅做法：

Expected number of days=Total days×P(condition)\text{Expected number of days} = \text{Total days} \times P(\text{condition})Expected number of days=Total days×P(condition)

呢個其實就係 E(Y) = n × p，即 Binomial Distribution 嘅期望值公式！

📝 Q6 完整總結：

Part考點核心公式答案
(a)搵 kΣP(X = x) = 1k = 0.05
(b)期望值E(X) = Σ x·P(X=x)2.0
(c)方差 & 標準差Var(X) = E(X²) - [E(X)]²Var = 1.40, σ = 1.1832
(d)預期日數n × P(condition)3 days

🧠 考試做呢類題嘅標準流程：

TEXT
Step 1：確認 ΣP = 1，搵 missing value
Step 2：整一個表，列出 x, P(X=x), x·P, x²·P
Step 3：加晒 x·P → 得到 E(X)
Step 4：加晒 x²·P → 得到 E(X²)
Step 5：Var(X) = E(X²) - [E(X)]²
Step 6：σ(X) = √Var(X)

⚠️ 常見陷阱：

  1. 「more than 3」唔包括 3！ P(X > 3) ≠ P(X ≥ 3)
    • P(X > 3) = P(X=4) + P(X=5)
    • P(X ≥ 3) = P(X=3) + P(X=4) + P(X=5)
  2. Var(X) 公式唔好記反：係 E(X²) - [E(X)]²，唔係 [E(X)]² - E(X²)
  3. σ 係 Var 開根號，唔好搞混

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Q7：另一題 Price Index！📊

USER:

Q7

ASSISTANT:

Q7 嘅內容我之前已經讀到，我再確認一下完整資料：

📘 Q7：Price Index（價格指數）— 第二題

題目背景：

一間玩具店嘅銷售資料：

201620172018
ItemsPriceQuantityPriceQuantityPriceQuantity
Slime6509601056
Stinky tack210021052120
Stinky egg460450660
Teddy Bear103011261224
Tortoise84011391236

Q7(a)：Laspeyres Price Index for 2018, Base Year = 2016

Laspeyres → 用 Base Year（2016）嘅 Quantity

公式：

PIL=∑q0×pt∑q0×p0×100PI_L = \frac{\sum q_0 \times p_t}{\sum q_0 \times p_0} \times 100PIL​=∑q0​×p0​∑q0​×pt​​×100

  • q₀ = 2016 Quantity
  • p₀ = 2016 Price
  • pₜ = 2018 Price

Step 1：計分子 Σ(q₀ × pₜ) — 2016 Quantity × 2018 Price

Itemq₂₀₁₆p₂₀₁₈q₀ × pₜ
Slime501050 × 10 = 500
Stinky tack1002100 × 2 = 200
Stinky egg60660 × 6 = 360
Teddy Bear301230 × 12 = 360
Tortoise401240 × 12 = 480

∑q0×pt=500+200+360+360+480=1900\sum q_0 \times p_t = 500 + 200 + 360 + 360 + 480 = \mathbf{1900}∑q0​×pt​=500+200+360+360+480=1900

Step 2：計分母 Σ(q₀ × p₀) — 2016 Quantity × 2016 Price

Itemq₂₀₁₆p₂₀₁₆q₀ × p₀
Slime50650 × 6 = 300
Stinky tack1002100 × 2 = 200
Stinky egg60460 × 4 = 240
Teddy Bear301030 × 10 = 300
Tortoise40840 × 8 = 320

∑q0×p0=300+200+240+300+320=1360\sum q_0 \times p_0 = 300 + 200 + 240 + 300 + 320 = \mathbf{1360}∑q0​×p0​=300+200+240+300+320=1360

Step 3：計 Laspeyres Price Index

PIL=19001360×100=139.71PI_L = \frac{1900}{1360} \times 100 = \boxed{139.71}PIL​=13601900​×100=139.71​

Q7(b)：Interpret your answer

✍️ Interpretation：

"Based on the Laspeyres Price Index, the overall price level of the five toy items in 2018 has increased by approximately 39.71% compared to the base year 2016, using 2016 quantities as weights."

Q7(c)：Paasche Price Index for 2018, Base Year = 2016

Paasche → 用 Current Year（2018）嘅 Quantity

公式：

PIP=∑qt×pt∑qt×p0×100PI_P = \frac{\sum q_t \times p_t}{\sum q_t \times p_0} \times 100PIP​=∑qt​×p0​∑qt​×pt​​×100

  • qₜ = 2018 Quantity
  • pₜ = 2018 Price
  • p₀ = 2016 Price

Step 1：計分子 Σ(qₜ × pₜ) — 2018 Quantity × 2018 Price

Itemq₂₀₁₈p₂₀₁₈qₜ × pₜ
Slime561056 × 10 = 560
Stinky tack1202120 × 2 = 240
Stinky egg60660 × 6 = 360
Teddy Bear241224 × 12 = 288
Tortoise361236 × 12 = 432

∑qt×pt=560+240+360+288+432=1880\sum q_t \times p_t = 560 + 240 + 360 + 288 + 432 = \mathbf{1880}∑qt​×pt​=560+240+360+288+432=1880

Step 2：計分母 Σ(qₜ × p₀) — 2018 Quantity × 2016 Price

Itemq₂₀₁₈p₂₀₁₆qₜ × p₀
Slime56656 × 6 = 336
Stinky tack1202120 × 2 = 240
Stinky egg60460 × 4 = 240
Teddy Bear241024 × 10 = 240
Tortoise36836 × 8 = 288

∑qt×p0=336+240+240+240+288=1344\sum q_t \times p_0 = 336 + 240 + 240 + 240 + 288 = \mathbf{1344}∑qt​×p0​=336+240+240+240+288=1344

Step 3：計 Paasche Price Index

PIP=18801344×100=139.88PI_P = \frac{1880}{1344} \times 100 = \boxed{139.88}PIP​=13441880​×100=139.88​

Q7(d)：Which item has the greatest inflation rate from 2017 to 2018?

唔使計算，直接答

思路：

逐個 item 比較 2017 → 2018 嘅價格變化百分比：

Itemp₂₀₁₇p₂₀₁₈變化升幅 %
Slime910+1+11.1%
Stinky tack2200%
Stinky egg46+2+50% ✅
Teddy Bear1112+1+9.1%
Tortoise1112+1+9.1%

Stinky egg\boxed{\text{Stinky egg}}Stinky egg​

Stinky egg has experienced the greatest inflation rate from 2017 to 2018, with a price increase from $4 to $6, representing a 50% increase.

🧠 呢類「邊個 inflation 最大」嘅技巧：

唔好淨係睇「加咗幾多錢」，要睇百分比！

例如：

  • Slime 加咗 1（由1（由 1（由9 → $10）= 11.1%
  • Stinky egg 加咗 2（由2（由 2（由4 → $6）= 50%

雖然 Stinky egg 只係加 $2，但因為底數細，所以百分比升幅最大！

Inflation Rate 公式：

Inflation Rate=pnew−poldpold×100%\text{Inflation Rate} = \frac{p_{\text{new}} - p_{\text{old}}}{p_{\text{old}}} \times 100\%Inflation Rate=pold​pnew​−pold​​×100%

📝 Q7 完整總結：

Part考點答案
(a)Laspeyres PI (Base=2016, Current=2018)139.71
(b)Interpretation價格上升約 39.71%
(c)Paasche PI (Base=2016, Current=2018)139.88
(d)Greatest inflation 2017→2018Stinky egg (+50%)

🧠 Laspeyres vs Paasche 再次溫習：

LaspeyresPaasche
Quantity 用邊年Base Year (q₀) 舊Current Year (qₜ) 新
分子q₀ × pₜqₜ × pₜ
分母q₀ × p₀qₜ × p₀
記法L = Last（舊）P = Present（新）
共同點分子永遠用 current price，分母永遠用 base price同左

⚠️ Q7 vs Q3 嘅分別：

Q3 同 Q7 都係 Price Index，但注意：

  • Q3(a) 係 Paasche，Q3(b) 係 Laspeyres
  • Q7(a) 係 Laspeyres，Q7(c) 係 Paasche
  • 考試一定要睇清楚題目要求邊個！

💡 額外 Tip — 兩個 Index 嘅比較：

通常：

  • Laspeyres 傾向高估 inflation（因為用舊數量，冇反映消費者因為加價而減少購買）
  • Paasche 傾向低估 inflation（因為用新數量，已經反映咗消費者轉買平嘢）

但呢題兩個好接近（139.71 vs 139.88），所以差異唔大。

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Q8：Time Series Analysis（時間序列分析）！📈

Q8

ASSISTANT:

Q8 嘅內容我之前已經讀到，我再確認一下完整資料同埋睇下有冇 part (c)：

read_file (state: result)

  "fileKey": "file:C:\\Users\\micha\\Downloads\\ES Revision Exercise.pdf-522267-1778092151688",
  "lineOffset": 145,
  "maxLines": 55
}

Result

{
  "fileKey": "file:C:\\Users\\micha\\Downloads\\ES Revision Exercise.pdf-522267-1778092151688",
  "content": "   146\t \n   147\tQ8.        \n   148\t \n   149\tThe following table shows the daily number of customers in a post office in 3 weeks. \n   150\t \n   151\t \n   152\t Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday \n   153\tWeek 1 304 102 134 156 201 \n   154\tWeek 2 287 88 125 144 190 \n   155\tWeek 3 269 67 98 121 174 \n   156\t \n   157\t \n   158\tNumber of customers \n   159\t \n   160\t \n   161\t(a) Describe the trend and seasonal variation of the number of customers by referring to the above time series \n   162\tplot.                    \n   163\t \n   164\t(b) Find the seasonal variation for Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday and Friday respectively by using the \n   165\tbelow 5-period moving average table.            \n   166\t \n   167\tWeek 1 Original \n   168\tData \n   169\t5-point \n   170\tMoving \n   171\tAverage \n   172\tWeek 2 Original \n   173\tData \n   174\t5-point \n   175\tMoving \n   176\tAverage \n   177\tWeek 3 Original \n   178\tData \n   179\t5-point \n   180\tMoving \n   181\tAverage \n   182\tMonday 304  Monday 287 171.4 Monday 269 153.6 \n   183\tTuesday 102  Tuesday 88 169 Tuesday 67 149 \n   184\tWednesday 134 179.4 Wednesday 125 166.8 Wednesday 98 145.8 \n   185\tThursday 156 176 Thursday 144 163.2 Thursday 121  \n   186\tFriday 201 173.2 Friday 190 159 Friday 174  \n   187\t \n   188\t \n   189\t  \n   190\t5 \n   191\t \n   192\tQ9. Peter is working in the Labor Department.  He is working on research which studies the daily expense of \n   193\tlaborers who are working in different districts.  He samples 20 workers, 8 working in Yuen Long and 12 \n   194\tworking in Causeway Bay.  He records their spending on lunch on 1 September 2019 and the results are as \n   195\tfollow: \n   196\t \n   197\t  Yuen Long:  33 35 38 40 48 53 55 62 \n   198\t \n   199\t  Causeway Bay: 43 48 50 54 58 63 74 80 82 88 89 93  \n   200\t ",
  "lineOffset": 145,
  "linesRead": 55,
  "totalLines": 623
}

好，Q8 只有 (a) 同 (b) 兩個 part。依家開始教你！

📘 Q8：Time Series Analysis（時間序列分析）

題目背景：

一間郵局 3 個星期嘅每日客人數量：

MondayTuesdayWednesdayThursdayFriday
Week 1304102134156201
Week 228788125144190
Week 32696798121174

首先，你要識嘅基礎概念：

🔍 咩係 Time Series（時間序列）？

  • 按照時間順序記錄嘅一組數據
  • 白話解釋：逐日 / 逐月 / 逐年記低嘅數字

📌 Time Series 有兩個重要組成部分：

1️⃣ Trend（趨勢）

  • 數據嘅長期方向 — 整體係升緊、跌緊、定係平穩？
  • 白話解釋：唔理短期上上落落，長遠嚟講係向邊個方向行？

2️⃣ Seasonal Variation（季節性變動）

  • 數據喺固定週期內重複出現嘅規律性波動
  • 白話解釋：每個星期 / 每個月 / 每年都有類似嘅 pattern
  • 例如：每個星期一客人都特別多，星期二都特別少 → 呢個就係 seasonal variation

3️⃣ Moving Average（移動平均）

  • 用嚟消除 seasonal variation，搵出 trend
  • 白話解釋：將幾個連續數據平均一下，等波動冇咁大，可以睇到長期趨勢
  • 5-period Moving Average：每次攞連續 5 個數據嘅平均值

4️⃣ Seasonal Variation 嘅計算方法（Additive Model）

Seasonal Variation=Original Data−Moving Average\text{Seasonal Variation} = \text{Original Data} - \text{Moving Average}Seasonal Variation=Original Data−Moving Average

白話解釋：實際數字同「平滑後嘅趨勢」之間嘅差距，就係「季節性嘅影響」

Q8(a)：Describe the Trend and Seasonal Variation

觀察 Trend：

睇每個星期嘅同一日：

DayWeek 1Week 2Week 3趨勢
Monday304287269↓ 下降
Tuesday1028867↓ 下降
Wednesday13412598↓ 下降
Thursday156144121↓ 下降
Friday201190174↓ 下降

又或者睇 Moving Average（已經消除咗季節波動）：

179.4→176→173.2→171.4→169→166.8→163.2→159→153.6→149→145.8179.4 → 176 → 173.2 → 171.4 → 169 → 166.8 → 163.2 → 159 → 153.6 → 149 → 145.8179.4→176→173.2→171.4→169→166.8→163.2→159→153.6→149→145.8

全部都係持續下降！

觀察 Seasonal Variation：

睇每個星期入面嘅 pattern：

MonTueWedThuFri
Week 1304（最高）102（最低）134156201
Week 2287（最高）88（最低）125144190
Week 3269（最高）67（最低）98121174

每個星期都係：Monday 最多客，Tuesday 最少客，之後逐漸回升到 Friday。呢個 pattern 每個星期都重複！

✍️ 答案：

Trend: "The overall trend is decreasing. The number of customers in the post office is declining over the 3-week period, as indicated by the decreasing moving averages (from 179.4 to 145.8)."

Seasonal Variation: "There is a clear seasonal (cyclical) pattern within each week. Monday has the highest number of customers, followed by a sharp drop on Tuesday (the lowest). The number then gradually increases from Wednesday to Friday. This pattern repeats consistently across all three weeks."

Q8(b)：計算每日嘅 Seasonal Variation

題目已經提供嘅 Moving Average 表：

我哋整理清楚：

WeekDayOriginal Data5-point MA
1Mon304—
1Tue102—
1Wed134179.4
1Thu156176.0
1Fri201173.2
2Mon287171.4
2Tue88169.0
2Wed125166.8
2Thu144163.2
2Fri190159.0
3Mon269153.6
3Tue67149.0
3Wed98145.8
3Thu121—
3Fri174—

🔍 點解頭兩個同最尾兩個冇 MA？

因為 5-period Moving Average 需要前後各 2 個數據，所以最頭 2 個同最尾 2 個計唔到！

Step 1：計每個有 MA 嘅 Seasonal Variation

SV=Original Data−Moving AverageSV = \text{Original Data} - \text{Moving Average}SV=Original Data−Moving Average

WeekDayOriginalMASV = Original - MA
1Wed134179.4134 - 179.4 = -45.4
1Thu156176.0156 - 176.0 = -20.0
1Fri201173.2201 - 173.2 = +27.8
2Mon287171.4287 - 171.4 = +115.6
2Tue88169.088 - 169.0 = -81.0
2Wed125166.8125 - 166.8 = -41.8
2Thu144163.2144 - 163.2 = -19.2
2Fri190159.0190 - 159.0 = +31.0
3Mon269153.6269 - 153.6 = +115.4
3Tue67149.067 - 149.0 = -82.0
3Wed98145.898 - 145.8 = -47.8

Step 2：將相同日子嘅 SV 平均

DaySV 數值平均 SV
Monday+115.6, +115.4(115.6 + 115.4) ÷ 2 = +115.5
Tuesday-81.0, -82.0(-81.0 + (-82.0)) ÷ 2 = -81.5
Wednesday-45.4, -41.8, -47.8(-45.4 + (-41.8) + (-47.8)) ÷ 3 = -45.0
Thursday-20.0, -19.2(-20.0 + (-19.2)) ÷ 2 = -19.6
Friday+27.8, +31.0(27.8 + 31.0) ÷ 2 = +29.4

✅ 最終答案：

DaySeasonal Variation
Monday+115.5
Tuesday-81.5
Wednesday-45.0
Thursday-19.6
Friday+29.4

✍️ 點解讀 Seasonal Variation？

SV 值意思
正數 (+)呢日嘅客人數高過趨勢平均
負數 (-)呢日嘅客人數低過趨勢平均
數值越大偏離趨勢越多

所以：

  • Monday (+115.5)：星期一平均比趨勢多 115.5 個客人 → 最旺嘅日子
  • Tuesday (-81.5)：星期二平均比趨勢少 81.5 個客人 → 最淡嘅日子
  • Friday (+29.4)：星期五都比趨勢多客，但冇 Monday 咁誇張

📝 Q8 完整總結：

Part考點重點
(a)描述 Trend + Seasonal VariationTrend: 持續下降；SV: Monday 最多客，Tuesday 最少，每週重複
(b)計算每日嘅 Seasonal VariationSV = Original - MA，再按日子平均

🧠 Time Series 考試必記流程：

TEXT
Step 1：搵 Moving Average（題目通常會提供）
Step 2：SV = Original Data - Moving Average
Step 3：將同一日嘅 SV 全部搵出嚟
Step 4：平均 → 得到該日嘅 Seasonal Variation

🧠 記憶口訣：

  • Trend = 「長期方向」→ 升 / 跌 / 平
  • Seasonal Variation = 「短期規律」→ 每個週期重複
  • Moving Average = 「磨平波動嘅工具」
  • SV = Original - MA = 「實際 - 平滑 = 季節影響」

⚠️ 常見陷阱：

  1. 5-period MA 頭尾各 2 個冇得計，唔好亂填
  2. SV 可以係負數，唔好以為一定係正
  3. 平均 SV 嘅時候注意有幾個數：Wednesday 有 3 個（Week 1, 2, 3 都有），但 Monday 只有 2 個（Week 2, 3）
  4. 描述 Trend 嘅時候，最好引用 MA 數據嚟支持你嘅答案

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Q9：Descriptive Statistics — Combined Data（合併數據嘅描述統計）！📊

He is working on research which studies the daily expense of \n   193\tlaborers who are working in different districts.  He samples 20 workers, 8 working in Yuen Long and 12 \n   194\tworking in Causeway Bay.  He records their spending on lunch on 1 September 2019 and the results are as \n   195\tfollow: \n   196\t \n   197\t  Yuen Long:  33 35 38 40 48 53 55 62 \n   198\t \n   199\t  Causeway Bay: 43 48 50 54 58 63 74 80 82 88 89 93  \n   200\t \n   201\t(a) Find the sample mean and sample standard deviation of spending on lunch on 1 September 2019 for those \n   202\twho are working in Yuen Long and Causeway Bay respectively. \n   203\t \n   204\t(b) Give a simple comparison on the spending on lunch by workers working in Yuen Long and Causeway Bay \n   205\tby using the result in part (a). \n   206\t \n   207\t(c) For the combined data, find the sample mean, sample standard deviation, and 82\n   208\tth\n   209\t percentile of spending on \n   210\tlunch on 1 September 2019.   \n   211\t \n   212\t \n   213\tQ10. The following is the probability distribution function of the number of customers (X) of a car maintenance \n   214\tshop in a day. \n   215\t \n   216\tx 0 1 2 3 4 \n   217\tP(X = x) 0.1 0.25 k 0.3 0.15 \n   218\t \n   219\t(a)  Find the value of k.            \n   220\t \n   221\t(b) Find E(X) and Var(X).             \n   222\t \n   223\t(c)  The profit Y (in $) of the shop is assumed to follow the function Y = 5000X - 7000. Find E(Y) and Var(Y).  \n   224\t \n   225\t \n   226\tQ11. The time requires to finish a transaction with an ATM machine follows a normal distribution with unknown \n   227\tmean and a population standard deviation of 0.4 minute.  In order to estimate the population mean time \n   228\trequires to finish a transaction with the ATM machine, a random sample of 25 transactions is taken.  The \n   229\tsample mean time is 2.2 minutes. \n   230\t \n   231\t(ai) Construct a 95% confidence interval estimate for the population mean time requires to finish a transaction.\n   232\t           \n   233\t(aii) The researcher suggests doing the study again so that the point estimate should be within 0.08 minute from \n   234\tthe true population mean at the 95% confidence level.  How large should the sample size be?  \n   235\t \n   236\t(b) Another random sample is taken in order to estimate the population proportion of ATM machine users who \n   237\twithdraw more than $1900 in one transaction.  In a sample with 300 randomly selected ATM machine users, \n   238\t45 of them withdraw more than $1900.  Construct a 98% confidence interval estimate for the population \n   239\tproportion of ATM machine users who withdraw more than $1900 in one transaction. \n   240\t  \n   241\t6 \n   242\t \n   243\tQ12. The table shows the sales of televisions set (in thousands) in an electrical appliance shop in year 2012 – 2019. \n   244\t   \n   245\tYear 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 \n   246\tSales \n   247\t(1000s) \n   248\t14.3 15.2 15.7 17.3 19.6 21.4 25.2 26.9 \n   249\t \n   250\t(a) Find the linear regression equation for the trend. Interpret the slope of the line. \n   251\t(b) Use the equation obtained in (a) to forecast the sales of televisions set in year 2021. \n   252\t(c) The time series plot of the quarterly sales in years 2017-2019 is given below. Referring to the time series \n   253\tplot, describe the seasonal variation of the sales of television set.  (In a short paragraph of around 20 words.) \n   254\t \n   255\t  \n   256\t                    \n   257\t(d) Complete the following table and calculate the seasonal variation for Quarter 1, Quarter 2, Quarter 3, and \n   258\tQuarter 4.   \n   259\t \n   260\tYear Quarter Sales \n   261\t(1000) \n   262\tCentered           \n   263\t4-period Moving \n   264\tAverage (1000) \n   265\t2017 1 4.8  \n   266\t2017 2 4.1 \n   267\t2017 3  5.475 \n   268\t2017 4 6.5 5.7375 \n   269\t2018 1 5.8 5.975 \n   270\t2018 2 5.2 6.1875 ",

好，我已經讀到 Q9 嘅完整內容。依家開始教你！

📘 Q9：Descriptive Statistics — 分組 + 合併數據

題目背景：

Peter 喺勞工處工作，研究唔同地區工人嘅午餐花費
抽樣 20 個工人：8 個喺元朗，12 個喺銅鑼灣
記錄佢哋 2019 年 9 月 1 日嘅午餐花費：

Yuen Long（元朗）：33, 35, 38, 40, 48, 53, 55, 62（n₁ = 8）

Causeway Bay（銅鑼灣）：43, 48, 50, 54, 58, 63, 74, 80, 82, 88, 89, 93（n₂ = 12）

Q9(a)：分別計算兩組嘅 Sample Mean 同 Sample Standard Deviation

📌 公式提醒：

xˉ=∑xn\bar{x} = \frac{\sum x}{n}xˉ=n∑x​

s=∑x2−nxˉ2n−1s = \sqrt{\frac{\sum x^2 - n\bar{x}^2}{n-1}}s=n−1∑x2−nxˉ2​​

🔵 Yuen Long（元朗）：n₁ = 8

Mean：

∑xYL=33+35+38+40+48+53+55+62=364\sum x_{YL} = 33 + 35 + 38 + 40 + 48 + 53 + 55 + 62 = \mathbf{364}∑xYL​=33+35+38+40+48+53+55+62=364

xˉYL=3648=45.5\bar{x}_{YL} = \frac{364}{8} = \boxed{45.5}xˉYL​=8364​=45.5​

Standard Deviation：

先計 Σx²：

xx²
331,089
351,225
381,444
401,600
482,304
532,809
553,025
623,844

∑xYL2=1089+1225+1444+1600+2304+2809+3025+3844=17,340\sum x^2_{YL} = 1089 + 1225 + 1444 + 1600 + 2304 + 2809 + 3025 + 3844 = \mathbf{17{,}340}∑xYL2​=1089+1225+1444+1600+2304+2809+3025+3844=17,340

sYL=17340−8×(45.5)28−1=17340−8×2070.257=17340−165627=7787=111.14=10.54s_{YL} = \sqrt{\frac{17340 - 8 \times (45.5)^2}{8-1}} = \sqrt{\frac{17340 - 8 \times 2070.25}{7}} = \sqrt{\frac{17340 - 16562}{7}} = \sqrt{\frac{778}{7}} = \sqrt{111.14} = \boxed{10.54}sYL​=8−117340−8×(45.5)2​​=717340−8×2070.25​​=717340−16562​​=7778​​=111.14​=10.54​

🔴 Causeway Bay（銅鑼灣）：n₂ = 12

Mean：

∑xCB=43+48+50+54+58+63+74+80+82+88+89+93=822\sum x_{CB} = 43 + 48 + 50 + 54 + 58 + 63 + 74 + 80 + 82 + 88 + 89 + 93 = \mathbf{822}∑xCB​=43+48+50+54+58+63+74+80+82+88+89+93=822

xˉCB=82212=68.5\bar{x}_{CB} = \frac{822}{12} = \boxed{68.5}xˉCB​=12822​=68.5​

Standard Deviation：

xx²
431,849
482,304
502,500
542,916
583,364
633,969
745,476
806,400
826,724
887,744
897,921
938,649

∑xCB2=1849+2304+2500+2916+3364+3969+5476+6400+6724+7744+7921+8649=59,816\sum x^2_{CB} = 1849 + 2304 + 2500 + 2916 + 3364 + 3969 + 5476 + 6400 + 6724 + 7744 + 7921 + 8649 = \mathbf{59{,}816}∑xCB2​=1849+2304+2500+2916+3364+3969+5476+6400+6724+7744+7921+8649=59,816

sCB=59816−12×(68.5)212−1=59816−12×4692.2511=59816−5630711=350911=319.0=17.86s_{CB} = \sqrt{\frac{59816 - 12 \times (68.5)^2}{12-1}} = \sqrt{\frac{59816 - 12 \times 4692.25}{11}} = \sqrt{\frac{59816 - 56307}{11}} = \sqrt{\frac{3509}{11}} = \sqrt{319.0} = \boxed{17.86}sCB​=12−159816−12×(68.5)2​​=1159816−12×4692.25​​=1159816−56307​​=113509​​=319.0​=17.86​

✅ Part (a) 答案總結：

Yuen LongCauseway Bay
Sample Mean$45.5$68.5
Sample SD$10.54$17.86

Q9(b)：Simple Comparison（簡單比較）

📌 比較要講兩個方面：Central Tendency（集中趨勢）+ Dispersion（離散程度）

✍️ 答案：

Central Tendency (Mean):
"The average lunch spending of workers in Causeway Bay (68.5)ishigherthanthatofworkersinYuenLong(68.5) is higher than that of workers in Yuen Long (68.5)ishigherthanthatofworkersinYuenLong(45.5). This suggests that lunch is more expensive in Causeway Bay."

Dispersion (Standard Deviation):
"The standard deviation of lunch spending in Causeway Bay (17.86)islargerthanthatinYuenLong(17.86) is larger than that in Yuen Long (17.86)islargerthanthatinYuenLong(10.54). This indicates that the lunch spending in Causeway Bay is more spread out / has greater variability than in Yuen Long."

🧠 考試比較嘅模板：

TEXT
1. 比較 Mean → 邊個高/低 → 代表咩
2. 比較 SD → 邊個大/細 → 代表數據邊個更分散

呢兩個一定要寫齊！

Q9(c)：Combined Data（合併數據）— Mean, SD, 82nd Percentile

將元朗同銅鑼灣嘅數據合埋一齊（n = 20）

呢個係 Q9 最難嘅部分！

📌 Combined Mean（合併平均值）

xˉc=n1xˉ1+n2xˉ2n1+n2\bar{x}_c = \frac{n_1 \bar{x}_1 + n_2 \bar{x}_2}{n_1 + n_2}xˉc​=n1​+n2​n1​xˉ1​+n2​xˉ2​​

白話解釋：唔可以直接將兩個 mean 加埋除 2！因為兩組人數唔同，要用 weighted average（加權平均）！

xˉc=8×45.5+12×68.58+12=364+82220=118620=59.3\bar{x}_c = \frac{8 \times 45.5 + 12 \times 68.5}{8 + 12} = \frac{364 + 822}{20} = \frac{1186}{20} = \boxed{59.3}xˉc​=8+128×45.5+12×68.5​=20364+822​=201186​=59.3​

📌 Combined Standard Deviation（合併標準差）

呢個公式比較複雜，但考試必考！

sc=∑xall2−ncxˉc2nc−1s_c = \sqrt{\frac{\sum x^2_{\text{all}} - n_c \bar{x}_c^2}{n_c - 1}}sc​=nc​−1∑xall2​−nc​xˉc2​​​

其中：
∑xall2=∑xYL2+∑xCB2=17340+59816=77,156\sum x^2_{\text{all}} = \sum x^2_{YL} + \sum x^2_{CB} = 17340 + 59816 = \mathbf{77{,}156}∑xall2​=∑xYL2​+∑xCB2​=17340+59816=77,156

nc=20,xˉc=59.3n_c = 20, \quad \bar{x}_c = 59.3nc​=20,xˉc​=59.3

sc=77156−20×(59.3)220−1s_c = \sqrt{\frac{77156 - 20 \times (59.3)^2}{20 - 1}}sc​=20−177156−20×(59.3)2​​

=77156−20×3516.4919= \sqrt{\frac{77156 - 20 \times 3516.49}{19}}=1977156−20×3516.49​​

=77156−70329.819= \sqrt{\frac{77156 - 70329.8}{19}}=1977156−70329.8​​

=6826.219= \sqrt{\frac{6826.2}{19}}=196826.2​​

=359.27= \sqrt{359.27}=359.27​

=18.96= \boxed{18.96}=18.96​

🧠 Combined SD 嘅關鍵：

你需要知道 Σx²（全部數據嘅平方和）！

有兩個方法搵：

  1. 直接加：Σx²_all = Σx²_group1 + Σx²_group2（就係我哋用嘅方法）
  2. 由 s 反推：如果題目只俾你 s 同 mean，可以用 ∑x2=(n−1)s2+nxˉ2\sum x^2 = (n-1)s^2 + n\bar{x}^2∑x2=(n−1)s2+nxˉ2 反推

📌 82nd Percentile（第 82 百分位數）

首先要將 20 個數據合併排序：

33,35,38,40,43,48,48,50,53,54,55,58,62,63,74,80,82,88,89,9333, 35, 38, 40, 43, 48, 48, 50, 53, 54, 55, 58, 62, 63, 74, 80, 82, 88, 89, 9333,35,38,40,43,48,48,50,53,54,55,58,62,63,74,80,82,88,89,93

（n = 20）

位置公式：

L=P100×(n+1)=82100×21=17.22L = \frac{P}{100} \times (n + 1) = \frac{82}{100} \times 21 = 17.22L=100P​×(n+1)=10082​×21=17.22

即第 17 個同第 18 個數之間，偏向第 18 個（0.22 嘅比例）

查數據：

  • 第 17 個：82
  • 第 18 個：88

P82=x17+0.22×(x18−x17)=82+0.22×(88−82)=82+0.22×6=82+1.32=83.32P_{82} = x_{17} + 0.22 \times (x_{18} - x_{17}) = 82 + 0.22 \times (88 - 82) = 82 + 0.22 \times 6 = 82 + 1.32 = \boxed{83.32}P82​=x17​+0.22×(x18​−x17​)=82+0.22×(88−82)=82+0.22×6=82+1.32=83.32​

🧠 Percentile 公式速記：

Position=P100×(n+1)\text{Position} = \frac{P}{100} \times (n + 1)Position=100P​×(n+1)

如果位置係小數，做 interpolation（插值）：

Value=x整數位+小數部分×(x下一個−x整數位)\text{Value} = x_{\text{整數位}} + \text{小數部分} \times (x_{\text{下一個}} - x_{\text{整數位}})Value=x整數位​+小數部分×(x下一個​−x整數位​)

📝 Q9 完整總結：

Part考點答案
(a) YL MeanΣx ÷ n$45.5
(a) YL SD√(Σx²-nx̄²)/(n-1)$10.54
(a) CB MeanΣx ÷ n$68.5
(a) CB SD√(Σx²-nx̄²)/(n-1)$17.86
(b) ComparisonMean + SD 都要比CB 平均高、更分散
(c) Combined MeanWeighted average$59.3
(c) Combined SD用 total Σx²$18.96
(c) 82nd PercentilePosition = P/100 × (n+1)$83.32

⚠️ 常見陷阱：

  1. Combined Mean 唔係兩個 mean 直接平均！ 因為 n₁ ≠ n₂，一定要用 weighted average
  2. Combined SD 唔係兩個 SD 直接平均！ 一定要用 Σx²_all 重新計
  3. 合併數據記得重新排序！ 唔好分開兩組排
  4. Percentile 嘅位置公式：用 (n+1) 唔係用 n
  5. Comparison 一定要寫兩方面：Mean（中心位置）+ SD（分散程度）

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Q10：Probability Distribution + Linear Transformation！📊

USER:

Q10

ASSISTANT:

read_file (state: result)

Args

{
  "fileKey": "file:C:\\Users\\micha\\Downloads\\ES Revision Exercise.pdf-522267-1778092151688",
  "lineOffset": 212,
  "maxLines": 15
}

Result

{
  "fileKey": "file:C:\\Users\\micha\\Downloads\\ES Revision Exercise.pdf-522267-1778092151688",
  "content": "   213\tQ10. The following is the probability distribution function of the number of customers (X) of a car maintenance \n   214\tshop in a day. \n   215\t \n   216\tx 0 1 2 3 4 \n   217\tP(X = x) 0.1 0.25 k 0.3 0.15 \n   218\t \n   219\t(a)  Find the value of k.            \n   220\t \n   221\t(b) Find E(X) and Var(X).             \n   222\t \n   223\t(c)  The profit Y (in $) of the shop is assumed to follow the function Y = 5000X - 7000. Find E(Y) and Var(Y).  \n   224\t \n   225\t \n   226\tQ11. The time requires to finish a transaction with an ATM machine follows a normal distribution with unknown \n   227\tmean and a population standard deviation of 0.4 minute.  In order to estimate the population mean time ",
  "lineOffset": 212,
  "linesRead": 15,
  "totalLines": 623
}

好，Q10 嘅內容已經確認。呢題同 Q6 好似，但多咗一個 Linear Transformation（線性變換） 嘅部分，呢個係考試熱門考點！

📘 Q10：Probability Distribution + Linear Transformation

題目背景：

一間汽車維修店每日客人數量 X 嘅概率分佈：

x01234
P(X = x)0.10.25k0.30.15

Q10(a)：Find the value of k

📌 核心規則：所有概率加埋 = 1

∑P(X=x)=1\sum P(X = x) = 1∑P(X=x)=1

0.1+0.25+k+0.3+0.15=10.1 + 0.25 + k + 0.3 + 0.15 = 10.1+0.25+k+0.3+0.15=1

0.8+k=10.8 + k = 10.8+k=1

k=0.2\boxed{k = 0.2}k=0.2​

完整嘅表：

x01234
P(X = x)0.10.250.20.30.15

Q10(b)：Find E(X) and Var(X)

📌 E(X)：Expected Value（期望值）

E(X)=∑x⋅P(X=x)E(X) = \sum x \cdot P(X = x)E(X)=∑x⋅P(X=x)

xP(X = x)x × P(X = x)
00.100 × 0.10 = 0
10.251 × 0.25 = 0.25
20.202 × 0.20 = 0.40
30.303 × 0.30 = 0.90
40.154 × 0.15 = 0.60

E(X)=0+0.25+0.40+0.90+0.60=2.15E(X) = 0 + 0.25 + 0.40 + 0.90 + 0.60 = \boxed{2.15}E(X)=0+0.25+0.40+0.90+0.60=2.15​

解讀：平均每日有 2.15 個客人。

📌 Var(X)：Variance（方差）

Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2Var(X) = E(X^2) - [E(X)]^2Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2

Step 1：計 E(X²)

xx²P(X = x)x² × P(X = x)
000.100 × 0.10 = 0
110.251 × 0.25 = 0.25
240.204 × 0.20 = 0.80
390.309 × 0.30 = 2.70
4160.1516 × 0.15 = 2.40

E(X2)=0+0.25+0.80+2.70+2.40=6.15E(X^2) = 0 + 0.25 + 0.80 + 2.70 + 2.40 = \mathbf{6.15}E(X2)=0+0.25+0.80+2.70+2.40=6.15

Step 2：代入公式

Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2=6.15−(2.15)2=6.15−4.6225=1.5275Var(X) = E(X^2) - [E(X)]^2 = 6.15 - (2.15)^2 = 6.15 - 4.6225 = \boxed{1.5275}Var(X)=E(X2)−[E(X)]2=6.15−(2.15)2=6.15−4.6225=1.5275​

Q10(c)：Linear Transformation — Y = 5000X - 7000

汽車維修店嘅利潤 Y（蚊）= 5000X - 7000
求 E(Y) 同 Var(Y)

📌 首先理解條公式嘅意思：

Y=5000X−7000Y = 5000X - 7000Y=5000X−7000

  • 5000X：每個客人帶嚟 $5000 收入
  • -7000：每日固定成本 $7000（租金、人工等）
  • 所以：利潤 = 收入 - 成本

例如：

  • 如果 X = 0（冇客人）：Y = 5000(0) - 7000 = -$7000（蝕錢！）
  • 如果 X = 2（2 個客人）：Y = 5000(2) - 7000 = $3000（賺錢！）

📌 Linear Transformation 公式：

如果 Y = aX + b，咁：

E(Y)=a⋅E(X)+bE(Y) = a \cdot E(X) + bE(Y)=a⋅E(X)+b

Var(Y)=a2⋅Var(X)Var(Y) = a^2 \cdot Var(X)Var(Y)=a2⋅Var(X)

呢度：a = 5000, b = -7000

E(Y)：

E(Y)=5000×E(X)+(−7000)E(Y) = 5000 \times E(X) + (-7000)E(Y)=5000×E(X)+(−7000)

=5000×2.15−7000= 5000 \times 2.15 - 7000=5000×2.15−7000

=10750−7000= 10750 - 7000=10750−7000

=$3750= \boxed{\$3750}=$3750​

解讀：平均每日利潤係 $3750。

Var(Y)：

Var(Y)=(5000)2×Var(X)Var(Y) = (5000)^2 \times Var(X)Var(Y)=(5000)2×Var(X)

=25,000,000×1.5275= 25{,}000{,}000 \times 1.5275=25,000,000×1.5275

=38,187,500= \boxed{38{,}187{,}500}=38,187,500​

即 Var(Y) = $38,187,500

如果要 SD(Y)：

SD(Y)=Var(Y)=38187500=$6179.77SD(Y) = \sqrt{Var(Y)} = \sqrt{38187500} = \boxed{\$6179.77}SD(Y)=Var(Y)​=38187500​=$6179.77​

🧠 Linear Transformation 公式大對比（超重要！）

Y = aX + bE(Y)Var(Y)SD(Y)
公式a·E(X) + ba²·Var(X)|a|·SD(X)
常數 b✅ 影響 E(Y)❌ 唔影響 Var(Y)❌ 唔影響 SD(Y)
係數 a✅ 影響 E(Y)✅ 影響（要平方！）✅ 影響（取絕對值）

🧠 點解 b 唔影響 Var 同 SD？

白話解釋：

  • Variance 同 SD 量度嘅係數據有幾分散
  • 加減一個常數（例如 -7000）只係將所有數據整體搬移，但佢哋之間嘅距離冇變
  • 好似全班同學每人加 10 分，平均分變咗，但分數嘅分散程度冇變！

🧠 點解 Var 要用 a² 而 SD 用 |a|？

因為 SD=VarSD = \sqrt{Var}SD=Var​，所以：

SD(Y)=a2⋅Var(X)=∣a∣⋅Var(X)=∣a∣⋅SD(X)SD(Y) = \sqrt{a^2 \cdot Var(X)} = |a| \cdot \sqrt{Var(X)} = |a| \cdot SD(X)SD(Y)=a2⋅Var(X)​=∣a∣⋅Var(X)​=∣a∣⋅SD(X)

📝 Q10 vs Q6 對比（兩題都係 Probability Distribution）：

Q6Q10
搵 kΣP = 1ΣP = 1
E(X)Σ x·P(X=x)Σ x·P(X=x)
Var(X)E(X²) - [E(X)]²E(X²) - [E(X)]²
額外考點預期日數 = n × PLinear Transformation Y = aX + b

📝 Q10 完整總結：

Part考點答案
(a)ΣP = 1 搵 kk = 0.2
(b)E(X)2.15
(b)Var(X)1.5275
(c)E(Y) = aE(X) + b$3,750
(c)Var(Y) = a²Var(X)$38,187,500

⚠️ 考試常見陷阱：

  1. Var(Y) = a² × Var(X)，唔係 a × Var(X)！a 要平方！
  2. E(Y) 有 + b，但 Var(Y) 冇 b！ 好多學生會錯寫成 Var(Y) = a²Var(X) + b
  3. 如果題目問 SD(Y)，記住 SD = √Var，或者直接用 |a| × SD(X)
  4. Y = 5000X - 7000 入面，a = 5000，b = -7000，b 係負數！代入 E(Y) 嗰陣要減

🧠 考試做呢類題嘅標準流程：

TEXT
Step 1：ΣP = 1 搵 missing value
Step 2：整表計 x·P → 加埋 → E(X)
Step 3：整表計 x²·P → 加埋 → E(X²)
Step 4：Var(X) = E(X²) - [E(X)]²
Step 5：如果有 Y = aX + b：
        → E(Y) = aE(X) + b
        → Var(Y) = a²Var(X)

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Q11：Confidence Interval 進階版（包括 Sample Size 計算）！📈

USER:

Q11

ASSISTANT:

read_file (state: result)

Args

{
  "fileKey": "file:C:\\Users\\micha\\Downloads\\ES Revision Exercise.pdf-522267-1778092151688",
  "lineOffset": 225,
  "maxLines": 20
}

Result

{
  "fileKey": "file:C:\\Users\\micha\\Downloads\\ES Revision Exercise.pdf-522267-1778092151688",
  "content": "   226\tQ11. The time requires to finish a transaction with an ATM machine follows a normal distribution with unknown \n   227\tmean and a population standard deviation of 0.4 minute.  In order to estimate the population mean time \n   228\trequires to finish a transaction with the ATM machine, a random sample of 25 transactions is taken.  The \n   229\tsample mean time is 2.2 minutes. \n   230\t \n   231\t(ai) Construct a 95% confidence interval estimate for the population mean time requires to finish a transaction.\n   232\t           \n   233\t(aii) The researcher suggests doing the study again so that the point estimate should be within 0.08 minute from \n   234\tthe true population mean at the 95% confidence level.  How large should the sample size be?  \n   235\t \n   236\t(b) Another random sample is taken in order to estimate the population proportion of ATM machine users who \n   237\twithdraw more than $1900 in one transaction.  In a sample with 300 randomly selected ATM machine users, \n   238\t45 of them withdraw more than $1900.  Construct a 98% confidence interval estimate for the population \n   239\tproportion of ATM machine users who withdraw more than $1900 in one transaction. \n   240\t  \n   241\t6 \n   242\t \n   243\tQ12. The table shows the sales of televisions set (in thousands) in an electrical appliance shop in year 2012 – 2019. \n   244\t   \n   245\tYear 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 ",
  "lineOffset": 225,
  "linesRead": 20,
  "totalLines": 623
}

好，Q11 嘅完整內容已經確認。呢題係 Confidence Interval 進階版，比 Q5 多咗一個超重要嘅考點：Minimum Sample Size（最小樣本量）！

📘 Q11：Confidence Interval 進階版

題目背景：

ATM 交易時間 ~ Normal Distribution

  • μ = unknown（未知）
  • σ = 0.4 minute（已知！）
  • Sample size: n = 25
  • Sample mean: x̄ = 2.2 minutes

⚡ 第一個關鍵判斷：用 Z 定 t？

條件呢題結論
σ known 定 unknown？σ = 0.4（已知！）✅ 用 Z

注意！呢題同 Q5(a) 唔同：

  • Q5(a)：σ unknown，用 sample SD (s = 25) → 用 t
  • Q11(a)：σ known = 0.4 → 用 Z

記住：睇到 "population standard deviation" = σ known → 用 Z！

Q11(ai)：95% Confidence Interval for Population Mean（σ known → Z）

📌 公式（σ known）：

xˉ±Zα/2×σn\bar{x} \pm Z_{\alpha/2} \times \frac{\sigma}{\sqrt{n}}xˉ±Zα/2​×n​σ​

符號意思數值
xˉ\bar{x}xˉSample Mean2.2
σ\sigmaσPopulation Standard Deviation0.4
nnnSample Size25
Confidence Level95%
α\alphaα1 - 0.950.05
α/2\alpha/2α/20.025
Z0.025Z_{0.025}Z0.025​1.96（必背！）

Step 1：Standard Error

SE=σn=0.425=0.45=0.08SE = \frac{\sigma}{\sqrt{n}} = \frac{0.4}{\sqrt{25}} = \frac{0.4}{5} = \mathbf{0.08}SE=n​σ​=25​0.4​=50.4​=0.08

Step 2：Margin of Error

ME=Zα/2×SE=1.96×0.08=0.1568ME = Z_{\alpha/2} \times SE = 1.96 \times 0.08 = \mathbf{0.1568}ME=Zα/2​×SE=1.96×0.08=0.1568

Step 3：Confidence Interval

xˉ±ME=2.2±0.1568\bar{x} \pm ME = 2.2 \pm 0.1568xˉ±ME=2.2±0.1568

=(2.2−0.1568,    2.2+0.1568)= (2.2 - 0.1568, \;\; 2.2 + 0.1568)=(2.2−0.1568,2.2+0.1568)

=(2.0432,    2.3568) minutes= \boxed{(2.0432, \;\; 2.3568) \text{ minutes}}=(2.0432,2.3568) minutes​

✍️ Interpretation：

"We are 95% confident that the population mean time required to finish a transaction with the ATM machine is between 2.0432 minutes and 2.3568 minutes."

Q11(aii)：Minimum Sample Size（最小樣本量）🔥 新考點！

研究員想重新做調查，要求：

  • Point estimate 同 true mean 嘅差距 ≤ 0.08 minute
  • 95% confidence level

📌 咩意思？

「Point estimate should be within 0.08 minute from the true population mean」

即係：Margin of Error (ME) ≤ 0.08

📌 公式：

由 ME 嘅公式反推 n：

ME=Zα/2×σnME = Z_{\alpha/2} \times \frac{\sigma}{\sqrt{n}}ME=Zα/2​×n​σ​

n=Zα/2×σME\sqrt{n} = \frac{Z_{\alpha/2} \times \sigma}{ME}n​=MEZα/2​×σ​

n=(Zα/2×σME)2\boxed{n = \left(\frac{Z_{\alpha/2} \times \sigma}{ME}\right)^2}n=(MEZα/2​×σ​)2​

代入數值：

符號數值
Zα/2Z_{\alpha/2}Zα/2​1.96（95% confidence）
σ\sigmaσ0.4
ME0.08

n=(1.96×0.40.08)2=(0.7840.08)2=(9.8)2=96.04n = \left(\frac{1.96 \times 0.4}{0.08}\right)^2 = \left(\frac{0.784}{0.08}\right)^2 = (9.8)^2 = \boxed{96.04}n=(0.081.96×0.4​)2=(0.080.784​)2=(9.8)2=96.04​

⚠️ 超重要！一定要 Round Up（無條件進位）！

n=96.04→n=97n = 96.04 \rightarrow \boxed{n = 97}n=96.04→n=97​

點解一定要 round up？

  • 因為 96.04 個人唔夠（你唔可以有 0.04 個人）
  • 如果你 round down 做 96，ME 會大過 0.08，唔符合要求
  • 所以一定要 round up to the next whole number！

✍️ 答案：

"The minimum sample size required is 97."

🧠 Minimum Sample Size 公式總結：

估 Mean 嘅 Minimum Sample Size：

n=(Zα/2×σME)2n = \left(\frac{Z_{\alpha/2} \times \sigma}{ME}\right)^2n=(MEZα/2​×σ​)2

估 Proportion 嘅 Minimum Sample Size（如果考到）：

n=p^(1−p^)(Zα/2ME)2n = \hat{p}(1-\hat{p})\left(\frac{Z_{\alpha/2}}{ME}\right)^2n=p^​(1−p^​)(MEZα/2​​)2

如果唔知 p^\hat{p}p^​，用 p^=0.5\hat{p} = 0.5p^​=0.5（呢個會俾你最大嘅 n，最保守）

兩個公式都要記住：永遠 ROUND UP！

Q11(b)：98% Confidence Interval for Population Proportion

新嘅情境：

  • Sample size: n = 300
  • 提取超過 $1900 嘅人數: 45
  • Sample proportion: p̂ = 45/300 = 0.15
  • 要求：98% Confidence Interval

📌 公式（Proportion → 永遠用 Z）：

p^±Zα/2×p^(1−p^)n\hat{p} \pm Z_{\alpha/2} \times \sqrt{\frac{\hat{p}(1-\hat{p})}{n}}p^​±Zα/2​×np^​(1−p^​)​​

符號數值
p^\hat{p}p^​45/300 = 0.15
1−p^1 - \hat{p}1−p^​0.85
nnn300
Confidence Level98%
α\alphaα1 - 0.98 = 0.02
α/2\alpha/2α/20.01
Z0.01Z_{0.01}Z0.01​2.326（要背或查表！）

🧠 Z 值必背表（更新版）：

Confidence Levelαα/2Z value
90%0.100.051.645
95%0.050.0251.96
98%0.020.012.326
99%0.010.0052.576

98% 呢個新嘅！之前 Q5 冇考到！

Step 1：Standard Error

SE=p^(1−p^)n=0.15×0.85300=0.1275300=0.000425=0.02062SE = \sqrt{\frac{\hat{p}(1-\hat{p})}{n}} = \sqrt{\frac{0.15 \times 0.85}{300}} = \sqrt{\frac{0.1275}{300}} = \sqrt{0.000425} = \mathbf{0.02062}SE=np^​(1−p^​)​​=3000.15×0.85​​=3000.1275​​=0.000425​=0.02062

Step 2：Margin of Error

ME=Zα/2×SE=2.326×0.02062=0.04796ME = Z_{\alpha/2} \times SE = 2.326 \times 0.02062 = \mathbf{0.04796}ME=Zα/2​×SE=2.326×0.02062=0.04796

Step 3：Confidence Interval

p^±ME=0.15±0.04796\hat{p} \pm ME = 0.15 \pm 0.04796p^​±ME=0.15±0.04796

=(0.15−0.04796,    0.15+0.04796)= (0.15 - 0.04796, \;\; 0.15 + 0.04796)=(0.15−0.04796,0.15+0.04796)

=(0.1020,    0.1980)= \boxed{(0.1020, \;\; 0.1980)}=(0.1020,0.1980)​

即大約 (10.20%, 19.80%)

✍️ Interpretation：

"We are 98% confident that the population proportion of ATM machine users who withdraw more than $1900 in one transaction is between 0.1020 (10.20%) and 0.1980 (19.80%)."

📝 Q11 vs Q5 完整對比：

Q5(a)Q11(ai)Q5(b)Q11(b)
估咩MeanMeanProportionProportion
σUnknownKnown——
用 Z 定 ttZZZ
Confidence90%95%95%98%
額外考點—Minimum Sample Size——

📝 Q11 完整總結：

Part考點答案
(ai)CI for Mean, σ known → Z(2.0432, 2.3568)
(aii)Minimum Sample Sizen = 97（round up！）
(b)CI for Proportion, 98%(0.1020, 0.1980)

🧠 Confidence Interval 終極決策樹：

TEXT
要估咩？
├── Population Mean (μ)
│   ├── σ known → 用 Z → x̄ ± Z × σ/√n
│   └── σ unknown → 用 t → x̄ ± t × s/√n (df = n-1)
│
└── Population Proportion (p)
    └── 永遠用 Z → p̂ ± Z × √[p̂(1-p̂)/n]

⚠️ Q11 常見陷阱：

  1. σ known vs unknown 一定要判斷清楚！ 呢題 σ = 0.4 係 known → 用 Z
  2. Minimum Sample Size 一定要 ROUND UP！ 96.04 → 97，唔係 96
  3. 98% CI 嘅 Z = 2.326，唔好同 99% 嘅 2.576 搞混
  4. Proportion 永遠用 Z，就算 n 好細都係用 Z
  5. p̂ = 成功數 ÷ 總數，呢題 p̂ = 45/300 = 0.15

準備好就話 "Next"，我會教你 Q12：Time Series + Linear Regression（時間序列 + 線性回歸）！📈

USER:

ASSISTANT:

{
  "fileKey": "file:C:\\Users\\micha\\Downloads\\ES Revision Exercise.pdf-522267-1778092151688",
  "content": "   243\tQ12. The table shows the sales of televisions set (in thousands) in an electrical appliance shop in year 2012 – 2019. \n   244\t   \n   245\tYear 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 \n   246\tSales \n   247\t(1000s) \n   248\t14.3 15.2 15.7 17.3 19.6 21.4 25.2 26.9 \n   249\t \n   250\t(a) Find the linear regression equation for the trend. Interpret the slope of the line. \n   251\t(b) Use the equation obtained in (a) to forecast the sales of televisions set in year 2021. \n   252\t(c) The time series plot of the quarterly sales in years 2017-2019 is given below. Referring to the time series \n   253\tplot, describe the seasonal variation of the sales of television set.  (In a short paragraph of around 20 words.) \n   254\t \n   255\t  \n   256\t                    \n   257\t(d) Complete the following table and calculate the seasonal variation for Quarter 1, Quarter 2, Quarter 3, and \n   258\tQuarter 4.   \n   259\t \n   260\tYear Quarter Sales \n   261\t(1000) \n   262\tCentered           \n   263\t4-period Moving \n   264\tAverage (1000) \n   265\t2017 1 4.8  \n   266\t2017 2 4.1 \n   267\t2017 3  5.475 \n   268\t2017 4 6.5 5.7375 \n   269\t2018 1 5.8 5.975 \n   270\t2018 2 5.2 6.1875 \n   271\t2018 3 6.8  \n   272\t2018 4 7.4 6.4 \n   273\t2019 1 6 6.5375 \n   274\t2019 2 5.6 6.675 \n   275\t2019 3 7.5  \n   276\t2019 4 7.8 \n   277\t \n   278\t \n   279\t  \n   280\t0\n   281\t1\n   282\t2\n   283\t3\n   284\t4\n   285\t5\n   286\t6\n   287\t7\n   288\t8\n   289\t9\n   290\t123456789101112\n   291\tTime: (2017 Quarter 1 to 2019 Quarter 4)\n   292\tSales of Television Set (1000s)",
  "lineOffset": 242,
